title: The Price Is Not Right: Neuro-Symbolic Methods Outperform VLAs on Structured Long-Horizon Manipulation Tasks with Significantly Lower Energy Consumption
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have recently been proposed as a pathway toward generalist robotic policies capable of interpreting natural language and visual inputs to generate manipulation actions. However, their effectiveness and efficiency on structured, long-horizon manipulation tasks remain unclear. In this work, we present a head-to-head empirical comparison between a fine-tuned open-weight VLA model π0 and a neuro-symbolic architecture that combines PDDL-based symbolic planning with learned low-level control. We evaluate both approaches on structured variants of the Towers of Hanoi manipulation task in simulation while measuring both task performance and energy consumption during training and execution. On the 3-block task, the neuro-symbolic model achieves 95% success compared to 34% for the best-performing VLA. The neuro-symbolic model also generalizes to an unseen 4-block variant (78% success), whereas both VLAs fail to complete the task. During training, VLA fine-tuning consumes nearly two orders of magnitude more energy than the neuro-symbolic approach. These results highlight important trade-offs between end-to-end foundation-model approaches and structured reasoning architectures for long-horizon robotic manipulation, emphasizing the role of explicit symbolic structure in improving reliability, data efficiency, and energy efficiency. Code and models are available at https://price-is-not-right.github.io
tldr: The paper compares Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models against a neuro-symbolic approach on long-horizon manipulation tasks, finding that the neuro-symbolic method achieves significantly better performance and energy efficiency.
tldr_zh: 该论文比较了视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型和神经符号方法在长程操作任务中的表现，发现神经符号方法在性能和能源效率方面表现更好。
summary_zh: 视觉-语言-动作 (VLA) 模型最近被提出作为一种通往通用机器人策略的途径，该策略能够解释自然语言和视觉输入以生成操作动作。然而，它们在结构化、长时程操作任务上的有效性和效率仍然不清楚。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种直接的实证比较，对比了一个微调的开源权重 VLA 模型 π0 和一个神经符号架构，该架构将基于 PDDL 的符号规划与学习到的低级控制相结合。我们在模拟环境中评估了这两种方法在河内塔操作任务的结构化变体上的表现，同时测量训练和执行期间的任务性能和能耗。 在 3 块积木的任务中，神经符号模型实现了 95% 的成功率，而表现最佳的 VLA 模型仅为 34%。 神经符号模型还可以推广到未见过的 4 块积木变体（78% 的成功率），而两个 VLA 模型都未能完成该任务。 在训练期间，VLA 的微调消耗的能量几乎比神经符号方法高出两个数量级。 这些结果突出了端到端基础模型方法和用于长时程机器人操作的结构化推理架构之间的重要权衡，强调了显式符号结构在提高可靠性、数据效率和能源效率方面的作用。 代码和模型可在 https://price-is-not-right.github.io 获得。

title: MagicAgent: Towards Generalized Agent Planning
summary: The evolution of Large Language Models (LLMs) from passive text processors to autonomous agents has established planning as a core component of modern intelligence. However, achieving generalized planning remains elusive, not only by the scarcity of high-quality interaction data but also by inherent conflicts across heterogeneous planning tasks. These challenges result in models that excel at isolated tasks yet struggle to generalize, while existing multi-task training attempts suffer from gradient interference. In this paper, we present \textbf{MagicAgent}, a series of foundation models specifically designed for generalized agent planning. We introduce a lightweight and scalable synthetic data framework that generates high-quality trajectories across diverse planning tasks, including hierarchical task decomposition, tool-augmented planning, multi-constraint scheduling, procedural logic orchestration, and long-horizon tool execution. To mitigate training conflicts, we propose a two-stage training paradigm comprising supervised fine-tuning followed by multi-objective reinforcement learning over both static datasets and dynamic environments. Empirical results demonstrate that MagicAgent-32B and MagicAgent-30B-A3B deliver superior performance, achieving accuracies of $75.1\%$ on Worfbench, $55.9\%$ on NaturalPlan, $57.5\%$ on $τ^2$-Bench, $86.9\%$ on BFCL-v3, and $81.2\%$ on ACEBench, as well as strong results on our in-house MagicEval benchmarks. These results substantially outperform existing sub-100B models and even surpass leading closed-source models.
tldr: The paper introduces MagicAgent, foundation models designed for generalized agent planning, trained using a synthetic data framework and a two-stage training paradigm, achieving state-of-the-art performance across various planning benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了MagicAgent，这是一种为通用代理规划而设计的基础模型。该模型使用合成数据框架和两阶段训练范式进行训练，在各种规划基准测试中实现了最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 从被动文本处理器到自主智能体的演变，已将规划确立为现代智能的核心组成部分。然而，实现通用规划仍然难以捉摸，这不仅源于高质量交互数据的稀缺，还源于异构规划任务之间固有的冲突。这些挑战导致模型虽然擅长孤立任务，但难以泛化，而现有的多任务训练尝试则受到梯度干扰的影响。在本文中，我们提出了 \textbf{MagicAgent}，一系列专门为通用智能体规划而设计的基础模型。我们引入了一个轻量级且可扩展的合成数据框架，该框架可以生成跨越各种规划任务的高质量轨迹，包括分层任务分解、工具增强规划、多约束调度、程序逻辑编排以及长期工具执行。为了减轻训练冲突，我们提出了一种两阶段训练范式，包括监督微调，然后在静态数据集和动态环境上进行多目标强化学习。实验结果表明，MagicAgent-32B 和 MagicAgent-30B-A3B 表现出卓越的性能，在 Worfbench 上实现了 $75.1\%$ 的准确率，在 NaturalPlan 上实现了 $55.9\%$ 的准确率，在 $τ^2$-Bench 上实现了 $57.5\%$ 的准确率，在 BFCL-v3 上实现了 $86.9\%$ 的准确率，并在 ACEBench 上实现了 $81.2\%$ 的准确率，同时在我们内部的 MagicEval 基准测试中也取得了很好的结果。这些结果大大优于现有的 100B 以下的模型，甚至超越了领先的闭源模型。

title: Visual Prompt Guided Unified Pushing Policy
summary: As one of the simplest non-prehensile manipulation skills, pushing has been widely studied as an effective means to rearrange objects. Existing approaches, however, typically rely on multi-step push plans composed of pre-defined pushing primitives with limited application scopes, which restrict their efficiency and versatility across different scenarios. In this work, we propose a unified pushing policy that incorporates a lightweight prompting mechanism into a flow matching policy to guide the generation of reactive, multimodal pushing actions. The visual prompt can be specified by a high-level planner, enabling the reuse of the pushing policy across a wide range of planning problems. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed unified pushing policy not only outperforms existing baselines but also effectively serves as a low-level primitive within a VLM-guided planning framework to solve table-cleaning tasks efficiently.
tldr: This paper proposes a novel pushing policy that uses visual prompts to guide a flow matching policy, achieving better performance and versatility in object rearrangement, and integrates well with VLM-guided planning.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的推物策略，该策略利用视觉提示来引导流量匹配策略，从而在物体重新排列方面实现了更好的性能和通用性，并且可以很好地与VLM引导的规划集成。
summary_zh: 作为最简单的非抓取操作技能之一，推物已被广泛研究作为一种有效的物体重排列手段。然而，现有的方法通常依赖于由预定义的具有有限应用范围的推物基元组成的多步推物计划，这限制了它们在不同场景下的效率和通用性。本文中，我们提出了一种统一的推物策略，该策略将轻量级的提示机制整合到流匹配策略中，以指导反应式的、多模态的推物动作的生成。视觉提示可以由高层规划器指定，从而实现推物策略在各种规划问题中的重用。实验结果表明，所提出的统一推物策略不仅优于现有的基线方法，而且还能有效地作为VLM引导的规划框架中的底层基元，从而高效地解决餐桌清理任务。

title: Human-to-Robot Interaction: Learning from Video Demonstration for Robot Imitation
summary: Learning from Demonstration (LfD) offers a promising paradigm for robot skill acquisition. Recent approaches attempt to extract manipulation commands directly from video demonstrations, yet face two critical challenges: (1) general video captioning models prioritize global scene features over task-relevant objects, producing descriptions unsuitable for precise robotic execution, and (2) end-to-end architectures coupling visual understanding with policy learning require extensive paired datasets and struggle to generalize across objects and scenarios. To address these limitations, we propose a novel ``Human-to-Robot'' imitation learning pipeline that enables robots to acquire manipulation skills directly from unstructured video demonstrations, inspired by the human ability to learn by watching and imitating. Our key innovation is a modular framework that decouples the learning process into two distinct stages: (1) Video Understanding, which combines Temporal Shift Modules (TSM) with Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to extract actions and identify interacted objects, and (2) Robot Imitation, which employs TD3-based deep reinforcement learning to execute the demonstrated manipulations. We validated our approach in PyBullet simulation environments with a UR5e manipulator and in a real-world experiment with a UF850 manipulator across four fundamental actions: reach, pick, move, and put. For video understanding, our method achieves 89.97% action classification accuracy and BLEU-4 scores of 0.351 on standard objects and 0.265 on novel objects, representing improvements of 76.4% and 128.4% over the best baseline, respectively. For robot manipulation, our framework achieves an average success rate of 87.5% across all actions, with 100% success on reaching tasks and up to 90% on complex pick-and-place operations. The project website is available at https://thanhnguyencanh.github.io/LfD4hri.
tldr: This paper presents a modular imitation learning pipeline that enables robots to acquire manipulation skills from unstructured video demonstrations by decoupling video understanding (using TSM and VLMs) and robot imitation (using TD3-based RL), achieving high accuracy and success rates in simulation and real-world environments.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种模块化的模仿学习流程，使机器人能够从非结构化的视频演示中学习操作技能，通过解耦视频理解（使用TSM和VLMs）和机器人模仿（使用基于TD3的RL），在仿真和真实环境中实现了高精度和成功率。
summary_zh: 模仿学习（LfD）为机器人技能获取提供了一种有前景的范式。最近的方法试图直接从视频演示中提取操作指令，但面临两个关键挑战：（1）通用视频描述模型优先考虑全局场景特征而非任务相关的对象，从而产生不适用于精确机器人执行的描述；（2）将视觉理解与策略学习相结合的端到端架构需要大量的配对数据集，并且难以在不同对象和场景中泛化。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种新颖的“人到机器人”模仿学习流程，使机器人能够直接从非结构化视频演示中获取操作技能，其灵感来源于人类通过观看和模仿进行学习的能力。我们的主要创新是一个模块化框架，将学习过程解耦为两个不同的阶段：（1）视频理解，它将时间偏移模块（TSM）与视觉-语言模型（VLM）相结合，以提取动作并识别交互对象；（2）机器人模仿，它采用基于TD3的深度强化学习来执行演示的操作。我们在PyBullet模拟环境中，使用UR5e机械臂，以及在现实世界实验中，使用UF850机械臂，对四个基本动作：到达、抓取、移动和放置，验证了我们的方法。对于视频理解，我们的方法在标准对象上实现了89.97%的动作分类准确率和0.351的BLEU-4分数，在新对象上实现了0.265的BLEU-4分数，相对于最佳基线分别提高了76.4%和128.4%。对于机器人操作，我们的框架在所有动作中实现了87.5%的平均成功率，其中到达任务的成功率为100%，复杂的抓取和放置操作的成功率高达90%。项目网站地址为：https://thanhnguyencanh.github.io/LfD4hri。

title: TactEx: An Explainable Multimodal Robotic Interaction Framework for Human-Like Touch and Hardness Estimation
summary: Accurate perception of object hardness is essential for safe and dexterous contact-rich robotic manipulation. Here, we present TactEx, an explainable multimodal robotic interaction framework that unifies vision, touch, and language for human-like hardness estimation and interactive guidance. We evaluate TactEx on fruit-ripeness assessment, a representative task that requires both tactile sensing and contextual understanding. The system fuses GelSight-Mini tactile streams with RGB observations and language prompts. A ResNet50+LSTM model estimates hardness from sequential tactile data, while a cross-modal alignment module combines visual cues with guidance from a large language model (LLM). This explainable multimodal interface allows users to distinguish ripeness levels with statistically significant class separation (p < 0.01 for all fruit pairs). For touch placement, we compare YOLO with Grounded-SAM (GSAM) and find GSAM to be more robust for fine-grained segmentation and contact-site selection. A lightweight LLM parses user instructions and produces grounded natural-language explanations linked to the tactile outputs. In end-to-end evaluations, TactEx attains 90% task success on simple user queries and generalises to novel tasks without large-scale tuning. These results highlight the promise of combining pretrained visual and tactile models with language grounding to advance explainable, human-like touch perception and decision-making in robotics.
tldr: The paper introduces TactEx, a multimodal (vision, touch, language) robotic interaction framework that uses a GelSight-Mini tactile sensor, RGB observations, and language prompts to estimate object hardness, particularly for fruit ripeness assessment, achieving high task success and generalizability. It leverages ResNet50+LSTM for tactile data processing, Grounded-SAM for touch placement, and LLMs for guidance and explainability.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为 TactEx 的多模态（视觉、触觉、语言）机器人交互框架，该框架使用 GelSight-Mini 触觉传感器、RGB 观测和语言提示来估计物体硬度，尤其适用于水果成熟度评估，实现了很高的任务成功率和泛化能力。它利用 ResNet50+LSTM 处理触觉数据，Grounded-SAM 进行触摸位置选择，并使用 LLM 进行指导和可解释性。
summary_zh: 物体硬度的准确感知对于安全灵巧的接触型机器人操作至关重要。本文提出了一种可解释的多模态机器人交互框架TactEx，它统一了视觉、触觉和语言，以实现类人硬度估计和交互式指导。 我们在水果成熟度评估上评估了TactEx，这是一个需要触觉传感和上下文理解的代表性任务。 该系统将GelSight-Mini触觉流与RGB观测和语言提示融合。 一个ResNet50+LSTM模型从序列触觉数据中估计硬度，而一个跨模态对齐模块将视觉线索与来自大型语言模型（LLM）的指导相结合。 这种可解释的多模态界面允许用户区分成熟度水平，并且具有统计学意义上的类别分离（所有水果对的p < 0.01）。 在触摸放置方面，我们将YOLO与Grounded-SAM（GSAM）进行比较，发现GSAM对于细粒度分割和接触点选择更具鲁棒性。 一个轻量级的LLM解析用户指令，并产生与触觉输出相关的基于语言的自然语言解释。 在端到端评估中，TactEx在简单的用户查询上实现了 90%的任务成功率，并且无需大规模调整即可泛化到新任务。 这些结果突显了将预训练的视觉和触觉模型与语言相结合的前景，以推进机器人领域中可解释的、类人触觉感知和决策。

title: No Need For Real Anomaly: MLLM Empowered Zero-Shot Video Anomaly Detection
summary: The collection and detection of video anomaly data has long been a challenging problem due to its rare occurrence and spatio-temporal scarcity. Existing video anomaly detection (VAD) methods under perform in open-world scenarios. Key contributing factors include limited dataset diversity, and inadequate understanding of context-dependent anomalous semantics. To address these issues, i) we propose LAVIDA, an end-to-end zero-shot video anomaly detection framework. ii) LAVIDA employs an Anomaly Exposure Sampler that transforms segmented objects into pseudo-anomalies to enhance model adaptability to unseen anomaly categories. It further integrates a Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) to bolster semantic comprehension capabilities. Additionally, iii) we design a token compression approach based on reverse attention to handle the spatio-temporal scarcity of anomalous patterns and decrease computational cost. The training process is conducted solely on pseudo anomalies without any VAD data. Evaluations across four benchmark VAD datasets demonstrate that LAVIDA achieves SOTA performance in both frame-level and pixel-level anomaly detection under the zero-shot setting. Our code is available in https://github.com/VitaminCreed/LAVIDA.
tldr: The paper proposes LAVIDA, a zero-shot video anomaly detection framework leveraging MLLMs and pseudo-anomalies generated by an anomaly exposure sampler, achieving SOTA performance without real anomaly data.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了 LAVIDA，一个零样本视频异常检测框架，利用多模态大型语言模型（MLLM）和一个异常暴露采样器生成的伪异常，在没有真实异常数据的情况下实现了 SOTA 性能。
summary_zh: 视频异常数据的收集与检测长期以来都是一个具有挑战性的问题，原因在于其稀有性和时空稀疏性。现有的视频异常检测 (VAD) 方法在开放世界场景下表现欠佳。其主要影响因素包括数据集多样性有限，以及对上下文相关的异常语义理解不足。为了解决这些问题，i) 我们提出了LAVIDA，一个端到端的零样本视频异常检测框架。ii) LAVIDA采用了一种异常曝光采样器，将分割后的对象转换为伪异常，以增强模型对未见异常类别的适应性。它进一步集成了多模态大型语言模型 (MLLM)，以提升语义理解能力。此外，iii) 我们设计了一种基于反向注意力的令牌压缩方法，以处理异常模式的时空稀疏性并降低计算成本。训练过程仅在伪异常上进行，无需任何VAD数据。在四个基准VAD数据集上的评估表明，在零样本设置下，LAVIDA在帧级别和像素级别的异常检测中均实现了SOTA性能。 我们的代码可在https://github.com/VitaminCreed/LAVIDA上获取。

title: Proximity-Based Multi-Turn Optimization: Practical Credit Assignment for LLM Agent Training
summary: Multi-turn LLM agents are becoming pivotal to production systems, spanning customer service automation, e-commerce assistance, and interactive task management, where accurately distinguishing high-value informative signals from stochastic noise is critical for sample-efficient training. In real-world scenarios, a failure in a trivial task may reflect random instability, whereas success in a high-difficulty task signifies a genuine capability breakthrough. Yet, existing group-based policy optimization methods rigidly rely on statistical deviation within discrete batches, frequently misallocating credit when task difficulty fluctuates. To address this issue, we propose Proximity-based Multi-turn Optimization (ProxMO), a practical and robust framework engineered specifically for the constraints of real-world deployment. ProxMO integrates global context via two lightweight mechanisms: success-rate-aware modulation dynamically adapts gradient intensity based on episode-level difficulty, while proximity-based soft aggregation derives baselines through continuous semantic weighting at the step level. Extensive evaluations on ALFWorld and WebShop benchmarks demonstrate that ProxMO yields substantial performance gains over existing baselines with negligible computational cost. Ablation studies further validate the independent and synergistic efficacy of both mechanisms. Crucially, ProxMO offers plug-and-play compatibility with standard GRPO frameworks, facilitating immediate, low-friction adoption in existing industrial training pipelines. Our implementation is available at: \href{https://anonymous.4open.science/r/proxmo-B7E7/README.md}{https://anonymous.4open.science/r/proxmo}.
tldr: The paper introduces ProxMO, a new reinforcement learning framework for training LLM agents that improves credit assignment in multi-turn tasks by considering task difficulty and semantic similarity between steps, showing significant gains on ALFWorld and WebShop with minimal computational cost and easy integration.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种新的用于训练LLM Agent的强化学习框架ProxMO，通过考虑任务难度和步骤之间的语义相似性来改进多轮任务中的奖励分配，在ALFWorld和WebShop上表现出显著的性能提升，且计算成本低，易于集成。
summary_zh: 多轮LLM智能体正在成为生产系统的关键，涵盖客户服务自动化、电子商务辅助和交互式任务管理等领域，其中精确区分高价值信息信号与随机噪声对于高效样本训练至关重要。在实际场景中，简单任务的失败可能反映了随机的不稳定性，而高难度任务的成功则标志着真正的能力突破。然而，现有的基于分组的策略优化方法僵化地依赖于离散批次内的统计偏差，在任务难度波动时常常错误地分配信用。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了基于邻近度的多轮优化 (ProxMO)，这是一个为实际部署的约束而专门设计的实用且稳健的框架。ProxMO通过两个轻量级机制整合了全局上下文：成功率感知调制基于episode层级的难度动态调整梯度强度，而基于邻近度的软聚合通过step层级的连续语义加权导出基线。在ALFWorld和WebShop基准上的广泛评估表明，与现有的基线相比，ProxMO以可忽略的计算成本实现了显著的性能提升。消融研究进一步验证了两种机制的独立和协同有效性。至关重要的是，ProxMO提供了与标准GRPO框架的即插即用兼容性，便于在现有工业训练管道中立即进行低摩擦采用。我们的实现可在以下网址获得：\href{https://anonymous.4open.science/r/proxmo-B7E7/README.md}{https://anonymous.4open.science/r/proxmo}。

title: How to Allocate, How to Learn? Dynamic Rollout Allocation and Advantage Modulation for Policy Optimization
summary: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has proven effective for Large Language Model (LLM) reasoning, yet current methods face key challenges in resource allocation and policy optimization dynamics: (i) uniform rollout allocation ignores gradient variance heterogeneity across problems, and (ii) the softmax policy structure causes gradient attenuation for high-confidence correct actions, while excessive gradient updates may destabilize training. Therefore, we propose DynaMO, a theoretically-grounded dual-pronged optimization framework. At the sequence level, we prove that uniform allocation is suboptimal and derive variance-minimizing allocation from the first principle, establishing Bernoulli variance as a computable proxy for gradient informativeness. At the token level, we develop gradient-aware advantage modulation grounded in theoretical analysis of gradient magnitude bounds. Our framework compensates for gradient attenuation of high-confidence correct actions while utilizing entropy changes as computable indicators to stabilize excessive update magnitudes. Extensive experiments conducted on a diverse range of mathematical reasoning benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements over strong RLVR baselines. Our implementation is available at: \href{https://anonymous.4open.science/r/dynamo-680E/README.md}{https://anonymous.4open.science/r/dynamo}.
tldr: This paper introduces DynaMO, a dual-pronged optimization framework for Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) that addresses rollout allocation and policy optimization challenges in LLM reasoning by minimizing gradient variance and modulating advantage based on gradient magnitude.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了 DynaMO，一个用于具有可验证奖励的强化学习 (RLVR) 的双管齐下的优化框架，它通过最小化梯度方差和基于梯度幅度调整优势来解决 LLM 推理中的 rollout 分配和策略优化挑战。
summary_zh: 具有可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）已被证明对于大型语言模型（LLM）的推理有效，然而，目前的方法在资源分配和策略优化动力学方面面临关键挑战：（i）均匀rollout分配忽略了不同问题之间的梯度方差异质性，以及（ii）softmax策略结构会导致高置信度正确动作的梯度衰减，而过度的梯度更新可能会破坏训练的稳定性。因此，我们提出 DynaMO，一个基于理论的双管齐下的优化框架。在序列级别，我们证明均匀分配并非最优，并从第一性原理推导出方差最小化分配，从而将伯努利方差确立为梯度信息性的可计算代理。在token级别，我们开发了基于梯度感知的优势调制，其依据是对梯度幅度边界的理论分析。我们的框架补偿了高置信度正确动作的梯度衰减，同时利用熵变化作为可计算的指标来稳定过大的更新幅度。在各种数学推理基准上进行的大量实验表明，相对于强大的RLVR基线，我们的方法取得了持续的改进。我们的实现代码可在\href{https://anonymous.4open.science/r/dynamo-680E/README.md}{https://anonymous.4open.science/r/dynamo}处获得。

title: VIGiA: Instructional Video Guidance via Dialogue Reasoning and Retrieval
summary: We introduce VIGiA, a novel multimodal dialogue model designed to understand and reason over complex, multi-step instructional video action plans. Unlike prior work which focuses mainly on text-only guidance, or treats vision and language in isolation, VIGiA supports grounded, plan-aware dialogue that requires reasoning over visual inputs, instructional plans, and interleaved user interactions. To this end, VIGiA incorporates two key capabilities: (1) multimodal plan reasoning, enabling the model to align uni- and multimodal queries with the current task plan and respond accurately; and (2) plan-based retrieval, allowing it to retrieve relevant plan steps in either textual or visual representations. Experiments were done on a novel dataset with rich Instructional Video Dialogues aligned with Cooking and DIY plans. Our evaluation shows that VIGiA outperforms existing state-of-the-art models on all tasks in a conversational plan guidance setting, reaching over 90\% accuracy on plan-aware VQA.
tldr: The paper introduces VIGiA, a multimodal dialogue model that understands and reasons about instructional videos by aligning user queries with visual inputs and instructional plans, achieving state-of-the-art performance on a new dataset.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了VIGiA，一个多模态对话模型，通过将用户查询与视觉输入和教学计划对齐，理解并推理教学视频，并在新的数据集上实现了最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 我们提出了VIGiA，一种新颖的多模态对话模型，旨在理解并推理复杂的、多步骤的指导性视频动作计划。与先前主要关注纯文本指导，或孤立地处理视觉和语言的工作不同，VIGiA支持基于上下文的、感知计划的对话，这需要对视觉输入、指导计划和交错的用户交互进行推理。为此，VIGiA整合了两项关键能力：（1）多模态计划推理，使模型能够将单模态和多模态查询与当前任务计划对齐并准确响应；以及（2）基于计划的检索，使其能够检索文本或视觉表示的相关计划步骤。我们使用一个包含丰富指导性视频对话并与烹饪和 DIY 计划对齐的新数据集进行了实验。我们的评估表明，在会话计划指导设置中，VIGiA在所有任务上都优于现有的最先进模型，在感知计划的 VQA 任务上准确率超过 90%。

title: Keep it SymPL: Symbolic Projective Layout for Allocentric Spatial Reasoning in Vision-Language Models
summary: Perspective-aware spatial reasoning involves understanding spatial relationships from specific viewpoints-either egocentric (observer-centered) or allocentric (object-centered). While vision-language models (VLMs) perform well in egocentric settings, their performance deteriorates when reasoning from allocentric viewpoints, where spatial relations must be inferred from the perspective of objects within the scene. In this study, we address this underexplored challenge by introducing Symbolic Projective Layout (SymPL), a framework that reformulates allocentric reasoning into symbolic-layout forms that VLMs inherently handle well. By leveraging four key factors-projection, abstraction, bipartition, and localization-SymPL converts allocentric questions into structured symbolic-layout representations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that this reformulation substantially improves performance in both allocentric and egocentric tasks, enhances robustness under visual illusions and multi-view scenarios, and that each component contributes critically to these gains. These results show that SymPL provides an effective and principled approach for addressing complex perspective-aware spatial reasoning.
tldr: The paper introduces Symbolic Projective Layout (SymPL), a framework that improves vision-language models' allocentric spatial reasoning by converting it into symbolic layout problems the models can better handle, leading to better performance and robustness.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了符号投影布局（SymPL）框架，通过将视觉-语言模型的以客体为中心的空间推理转化为模型更易处理的符号布局问题，从而提高其性能和鲁棒性。
summary_zh: 视角感知空间推理涉及到从特定视角理解空间关系——可以是自我中心（以观察者为中心）的，也可以是客观中心（以物体为中心）的。虽然视觉-语言模型（VLMs）在自我中心设置下表现良好，但当从客观中心的视角进行推理时，它们的性能会下降，因为空间关系必须从场景中物体的视角来推断。在本研究中，我们通过引入符号投影布局（SymPL）框架来解决这一未被充分探索的挑战，该框架将客观中心推理重新表述为VLMs固有擅长的符号布局形式。通过利用四个关键因素——投影、抽象、二分和定位——SymPL将客观中心问题转换为结构化的符号布局表示。广泛的实验表明，这种重新表述显著提高了在客观中心和自我中心任务中的性能，增强了在视觉错觉和多视角场景下的鲁棒性，并且每个组件都对这些增益做出了关键贡献。这些结果表明，SymPL为解决复杂的视角感知空间推理问题提供了一种有效且具有原则性的方法。

title: Direction-aware 3D Large Multimodal Models
summary: 3D large multimodal models (3D LMMs) rely heavily on ego poses for enabling directional question-answering and spatial reasoning. However, most existing point cloud benchmarks contain rich directional queries but lack the corresponding ego poses, making them inherently ill-posed in 3D large multimodal modelling. In this work, we redefine a new and rigorous paradigm that enables direction-aware 3D LMMs by identifying and supplementing ego poses into point cloud benchmarks and transforming the corresponding point cloud data according to the identified ego poses. We enable direction-aware 3D LMMs with two novel designs. The first is PoseRecover, a fully automatic pose recovery pipeline that matches questions with ego poses from RGB-D video extrinsics via object-frustum intersection and visibility check with Z-buffers. The second is PoseAlign that transforms the point cloud data to be aligned with the identified ego poses instead of either injecting ego poses into textual prompts or introducing pose-encoded features in the projection layers. Extensive experiments show that our designs yield consistent improvements across multiple 3D LMM backbones such as LL3DA, LL3DA-SONATA, Chat-Scene, and 3D-LLAVA, improving ScanRefer mIoU by 30.0% and Scan2Cap LLM-as-judge accuracy by 11.7%. In addition, our approach is simple, generic, and training-efficient, requiring only instruction tuning while establishing a strong baseline for direction-aware 3D-LMMs.
tldr: This paper addresses the lack of ego-pose information in existing point cloud benchmarks for 3D LMMs by introducing a pose recovery pipeline and an alignment method, achieving significant performance improvements across multiple 3D LMM backbones.
tldr_zh: 该论文针对现有3D大语言模型(LMMs)的点云基准数据缺乏自我姿态信息的问题，提出了一种姿态恢复流程和对齐方法，并在多个3D LMM骨干网络上实现了显著的性能提升。
summary_zh: 3D大型多模态模型（3D LMMs）严重依赖自我的姿态，以实现方向性问答和空间推理。然而，大多数现有的点云基准测试集包含丰富的方向性查询，但缺乏相应的自我姿态，这使得它们在3D大型多模态建模中本质上是不适定的。在这项工作中，我们重新定义了一种新的、严谨的范式，通过识别并补充点云基准测试集中的自我姿态，并根据识别的自我姿态转换相应的点云数据，从而使方向感知型3D LMM成为可能。我们通过两种新颖的设计实现了方向感知型3D LMM。第一种是PoseRecover，这是一个全自动的姿态恢复流水线，它通过对象视锥体相交和Z-buffer可见性检查，将问题与RGB-D视频外参中的自我姿态进行匹配。第二种是PoseAlign，它将点云数据转换为与识别的自我姿态对齐，而不是将自我姿态注入到文本提示中，或者在投影层中引入姿态编码特征。大量实验表明，我们的设计在多个3D LMM骨干网络（如LL3DA、LL3DA-SONATA、Chat-Scene和3D-LLAVA）中产生了持续的改进，将ScanRefer mIoU提高了30.0%，将Scan2Cap LLM-as-judge的准确率提高了11.7%。此外，我们的方法简单、通用且训练高效，仅需指令微调即可建立一个强大的方向感知型3D-LMM基线。

title: Global Commander and Local Operative: A Dual-Agent Framework for Scene Navigation
summary: Vision-and-Language Scene navigation is a fundamental capability for embodied human-AI collaboration, requiring agents to follow natural language instructions to execute coherent action sequences in complex environments. Existing approaches either rely on multiple agents, incurring high coordination and resource costs, or adopt a single-agent paradigm, which overloads the agent with both global planning and local perception, often leading to degraded reasoning and instruction drift in long-horizon settings. To address these issues, we introduce DACo, a planning-grounding decoupled architecture that disentangles global deliberation from local grounding. Concretely, it employs a Global Commander for high-level strategic planning and a Local Operative for egocentric observing and fine-grained execution. By disentangling global reasoning from local action, DACo alleviates cognitive overload and improves long-horizon stability. The framework further integrates dynamic subgoal planning and adaptive replanning to enable structured and resilient navigation. Extensive evaluations on R2R, REVERIE, and R4R demonstrate that DACo achieves 4.9%, 6.5%, 5.4% absolute improvements over the best-performing baselines in zero-shot settings, and generalizes effectively across both closed-source (e.g., GPT-4o) and open-source (e.g., Qwen-VL Series) backbones. DACo provides a principled and extensible paradigm for robust long-horizon navigation. Project page: https://github.com/ChocoWu/DACo
tldr: The paper introduces DACo, a dual-agent framework with a Global Commander and Local Operative, for vision-and-language scene navigation, achieving improved performance and generalization in long-horizon tasks compared to single-agent and multi-agent baselines.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了DACo，一个双智能体框架，包含全局指挥者和局部执行者，用于视觉语言场景导航。相比于单智能体和多智能体基线，该框架在长程任务中实现了性能和泛化能力的提升。
summary_zh: 视觉语言场景导航是具身人机协作的一项基本能力，它要求智能体遵循自然语言指令，在复杂环境中执行连贯的动作序列。现有方法要么依赖于多个智能体，导致高昂的协调和资源成本，要么采用单智能体范式，使得智能体同时承担全局规划和局部感知的任务，这通常会导致长程场景下推理能力下降和指令漂移。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了DACo，这是一种规划-接地解耦架构，将全局深思熟虑与局部接地分离。具体而言，它采用全局指挥者进行高层次的战略规划，以及本地行动者进行以自我为中心的观察和精细的执行。通过将全局推理与局部行动解耦，DACo减轻了认知负担，并提高了长程的稳定性。该框架进一步整合了动态子目标规划和自适应重规划，以实现结构化和具有弹性的导航。在R2R、REVERIE和R4R上的大量评估表明，DACo在零样本设置下，相对于最佳基线模型分别实现了4.9%、6.5%、5.4%的绝对性能提升，并且能够有效地泛化到闭源（例如，GPT-4o）和开源（例如，Qwen-VL系列）主干模型上。DACo为鲁棒的长程导航提供了一种有原则的、可扩展的范式。项目主页：https://github.com/ChocoWu/DACo

title: Capable but Unreliable: Canonical Path Deviation as a Causal Mechanism of Agent Failure in Long-Horizon Tasks
summary: Why do language agents fail on tasks they are capable of solving? We argue that many such failures are reliability failures caused by stochastic drift from a task's latent solution structure, not capability failures. Every well-defined tool-use task imposes a canonical solution path (i.e., a convergent set of tool invocations shared across successful runs) and agent success depends critically on whether a trajectory stays within this path's operating envelope. We establish this causally using a natural experiment that holds model capability and task difficulty fixed by construction. We analyze trajectories from the Toolathlon benchmark: 22 frontier models each attempt 108 real-world tool-use tasks across 3 independent runs, yielding 515 model$\times$task units where the same model succeeds on some runs and fails on others due to LLM sampling stochasticity alone. Within these units, successful runs adhere significantly more closely to the canonical solution path than failed runs ($+$0.060 Jaccard, $p<0.0001$, $n=488$ units, 95% CI [+0.043, +0.077]). This result survives six robustness checks including cross-model-family leave-one-out validation. Critically, the causal mechanism is gradual and self-reinforcing: the adherence gap is statistically indistinguishable from zero through the first 50% of the trajectory, ruling out early-branching selection bias, and each off-canonical tool call raises the probability that the next call is also off-canonical by 22.7 percentage points ($\hatβ=+0.227$, $p<0.0001$), more than doubling the baseline rate. These findings imply that agent reliability cannot be improved by capability scaling alone, but offer a highly actionable intervention: a simple monitor that restarts the bottom tercile of runs based on mid-trajectory canonical adherence lifts success rates by $+$8.8 percentage points among intervened runs.
tldr: This paper analyzes why language agents fail on tasks despite having the capability to solve them, attributing failures to stochastic drift from the optimal solution path and demonstrating that monitoring and restarting off-canonical runs can improve success rates.
tldr_zh: 本文分析了语言智能体为何会在有能力解决任务的情况下失败，将失败归因于偏离最佳解决方案路径的随机漂移，并证明监控和重启非典型运行可以提高成功率。
summary_zh: 语言智能体为什么会在它们明明有能力解决的任务上失败？我们认为，许多此类失败是由于与任务潜在解决方案结构发生随机漂移而导致的可靠性失败，而非能力失败。每个定义明确的工具使用任务都具有一个规范解决方案路径（即，在成功运行中共享的一组收敛的工具调用），并且智能体的成功关键取决于轨迹是否保持在该路径的操作范围内。我们通过一个自然实验因果地证实了这一点，该实验通过构造保持了模型能力和任务难度不变。我们分析了Toolathlon基准测试中的轨迹：22个前沿模型各自尝试了108个现实世界工具使用任务，进行了3次独立运行，产生了515个模型$\times$任务单元，其中相同的模型在某些运行中成功而在其他运行中失败，这仅仅是由于LLM采样随机性造成的。在这些单元中，成功运行比失败运行更紧密地遵循规范解决方案路径（+$0.060$ Jaccard， $p<0.0001$， $n=488$ 个单元，95% CI [+0.043, +0.077]）。该结果通过了六项稳健性检查，包括跨模型家族的留一验证。至关重要的是，因果机制是渐进且自我强化的：在轨迹的前50%中，遵循度差距在统计上与零无法区分，排除了早期分支选择偏差，并且每个非规范工具调用都使下次调用也为非规范调用的概率提高了22.7个百分点（$\hatβ=+0.227$， $p<0.0001$），使基线率增加了一倍以上。这些发现表明，仅靠扩展能力无法提高智能体的可靠性，但提供了一个高度可操作的干预措施：一个简单的监控器，根据中期轨迹规范遵循度重新启动底部三分之一的运行，可使干预运行的成功率提高+$8.8$个百分点。

title: 3D Shape Control of Extensible Multi-Section Soft Continuum Robots via Visual Servoing
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel vision-based control algorithm for regulating the whole body shape of extensible multisection soft continuum manipulators. Contrary to existing vision-based control algorithms in the literature that regulate the robot's end effector pose, our proposed control algorithm regulates the robot's whole body configuration, enabling us to leverage its kinematic redundancy. Additionally, our model-based 2.5D shape visual servoing provides globally stable asymptotic convergence in the robot's 3D workspace compared to the closest works in the literature that report local minima. Unlike existing visual servoing algorithms in the literature, our approach does not require information from proprioceptive sensors, making it suitable for continuum manipulators without such capabilities. Instead, robot state is estimated from images acquired by an external camera that observes the robot's whole body shape and is also utilized to close the shape control loop. Traditionally, visual servoing schemes require an image of the robot at its reference pose to generate the reference features. In this work, we utilize an inverse kinematics solver to generate reference features for the desired robot configuration and do not require images of the robot at the reference. Experiments are performed on a multisection continuum manipulator demonstrating the controller's capability to regulate the robot's whole body shape while precisely positioning the robot's end effector. Results validate our controller's ability to regulate the shape of continuum robots while demonstrating a smooth transient response and a steady-state error within 1 mm. Proof-of-concept object manipulation experiments including stacking, pouring, and pulling tasks are performed to demonstrate our controller's applicability.
tldr: This paper presents a novel vision-based control algorithm for regulating the whole body shape of extensible multisection soft continuum robots without proprioceptive sensors, demonstrating globally stable convergence and successful object manipulation.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新型的基于视觉的控制算法，用于调节可伸展多段软体连续机器人的整体形状，无需本体感受器，展示了全局稳定的收敛性和成功的物体操作。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种新型的基于视觉的控制算法，用于调节可伸展多段软体连续体机械臂的整体形状。与现有文献中调节机械臂末端执行器姿态的基于视觉的控制算法不同，我们提出的控制算法调节机器人整体配置，从而使我们能够利用其运动冗余。此外，与文献中报道存在局部最小值最接近的工作相比，我们基于模型的2.5D形状视觉伺服能够在机器人的3D工作空间中提供全局稳定的渐近收敛。与现有文献中的视觉伺服算法不同，我们的方法不需要来自本体感受传感器的信息，使其适用于没有这些能力的连续体机械臂。相反，机器人状态是从外部相机获取的图像中估计的，该相机观察机器人的整体形状，并用于闭合形状控制回路。传统上，视觉伺服方案需要机器人处于参考姿势时的图像来生成参考特征。在这项工作中，我们利用逆运动学求解器为所需的机器人配置生成参考特征，并且不需要机器人处于参考姿势时的图像。在多段连续体机械臂上进行实验，验证了控制器调节机器人整体形状同时精确定位机器人末端执行器的能力。结果验证了我们的控制器调节连续体机器人形状的能力，同时展示了平稳的瞬态响应和1毫米以内的稳态误差。进行概念验证的对象操纵实验，包括堆叠、倾倒和拉动任务，以证明我们控制器的适用性。

title: Agentic Problem Frames: A Systematic Approach to Engineering Reliable Domain Agents
summary:
Large Language Models (LLMs) are evolving into autonomous agents, yet current "frameless" development--relying on ambiguous natural language without engineering blueprints--leads to critical risks such as scope creep and open-loop failures. To ensure industrial-grade reliability, this study proposes Agentic Problem Frames (APF), a systematic engineering framework that shifts focus from internal model intelligence to the structured interaction between the agent and its environment.
  The APF establishes a dynamic specification paradigm where intent is concretized at runtime through domain knowledge injection. At its core, the Act-Verify-Refine (AVR) loop functions as a closed-loop control system that transforms execution results into verified knowledge assets, driving system behavior toward asymptotic convergence to mission requirements (R). To operationalize this, this study introduces the Agentic Job Description (AJD), a formal specification tool that defines jurisdictional boundaries, operational contexts, and epistemic evaluation criteria.
  The efficacy of this framework is validated through two contrasting case studies: a delegated proxy model for business travel and an autonomous supervisor model for industrial equipment management. By applying AJD-based specification and APF modeling to these scenarios, the analysis demonstrates how operational scenarios are systematically controlled within defined boundaries. These cases provide a conceptual proof that agent reliability stems not from a model's internal reasoning alone, but from the rigorous engineering structures that anchor stochastic AI within deterministic business processes, thereby enabling the development of verifiable and dependable domain agents.
tldr: The paper introduces Agentic Problem Frames (APF), a systematic engineering framework with the Act-Verify-Refine (AVR) loop to improve the reliability of LLM-based agents by focusing on structured agent-environment interaction, validated through case studies.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为 Agentic Problem Frames (APF) 的系统化工程框架，该框架包含 Act-Verify-Refine (AVR) 循环，通过关注结构化的智能体-环境交互来提升基于 LLM 的智能体的可靠性，并通过案例研究进行了验证。
summary_zh:
大型语言模型（LLM）正在演变为自主智能体，然而，目前“无框架”的开发模式——依赖含糊不清的自然语言，缺乏工程蓝图——导致诸如范围蔓延和开环失效等严重风险。为了确保工业级可靠性，本研究提出了一种系统化的工程框架——Agentic问题框架（APF），它将重点从内部模型智能转移到智能体与其环境之间的结构化交互。
APF建立了一种动态规范范式，其中意图通过领域知识注入在运行时被具体化。其核心是由行动-验证-精炼（AVR）循环构成的一个闭环控制系统，该系统将执行结果转化为经过验证的知识资产，从而驱动系统行为渐近收敛于任务需求（R）。为了使之可操作，本研究引入了Agentic工作描述（AJD），一种正式的规范工具，用于定义管辖范围、操作上下文和认知评估标准。
该框架的有效性通过两个对比鲜明的案例研究得到验证：用于商务旅行的委托代理模型和用于工业设备管理的自主监管模型。通过将基于AJD的规范和APF建模应用于这些场景，分析表明如何在定义的边界内系统地控制操作场景。这些案例提供了一个概念性的证明，即智能体的可靠性不仅仅源于模型内部的推理，而是源于将随机人工智能锚定在确定性业务流程中的严谨工程结构，从而实现可验证和可靠的领域智能体的开发。

title: How Far Can We Go with Pixels Alone? A Pilot Study on Screen-Only Navigation in Commercial 3D ARPGs
summary: Modern 3D game levels rely heavily on visual guidance, yet the navigability of level layouts remains difficult to quantify. Prior work either simulates play in simplified environments or analyzes static screenshots for visual affordances, but neither setting faithfully captures how players explore complex, real-world game levels. In this paper, we build on an existing open-source visual affordance detector and instantiate a screen-only exploration and navigation agent that operates purely from visual affordances. Our agent consumes live game frames, identifies salient interest points, and drives a simple finite-state controller over a minimal action space to explore Dark Souls-style linear levels and attempt to reach expected goal regions. Pilot experiments show that the agent can traverse most required segments and exhibits meaningful visual navigation behavior, but also highlight that limitations of the underlying visual model prevent truly comprehensive and reliable auto-navigation. We argue that this system provides a concrete, shared baseline and evaluation protocol for visual navigation in complex games, and we call for more attention to this necessary task. Our results suggest that purely vision-based sense-making models, with discrete single-modality inputs and without explicit reasoning, can effectively support navigation and environment understanding in idealized settings, but are unlikely to be a general solution on their own.
tldr: This paper explores screen-only navigation in 3D ARPGs using visual affordances, demonstrating some success but highlighting limitations of purely vision-based approaches for complex navigation.
tldr_zh: 本文探讨了仅使用屏幕在 3D ARPG 游戏中通过视觉可供性进行导航的问题，初步展示了少量成功案例，但也强调了纯视觉方法在复杂导航中的局限性。
summary_zh: 现代3D游戏关卡严重依赖视觉引导，但关卡布局的可导航性仍然难以量化。以往的研究要么在简化的环境中模拟游戏，要么分析静态截图中的视觉可供性，但两种设置都无法忠实地捕捉玩家如何探索复杂的、真实的游戏关卡。在本文中，我们基于现有的开源视觉可供性检测器，构建了一个纯粹从视觉可供性出发的、仅依靠屏幕信息的探索和导航智能体。我们的智能体接收实时的游戏帧，识别显著的兴趣点，并通过一个极简动作空间上的简单有限状态控制器来驱动智能体探索《黑暗之魂》风格的线性关卡，并尝试到达预期的目标区域。初步实验表明，该智能体可以遍历大部分所需的片段，并表现出有意义的视觉导航行为，但也强调了底层视觉模型的局限性阻碍了真正全面和可靠的自动导航。我们认为，该系统为复杂游戏中的视觉导航提供了一个具体的、共享的基准和评估协议，我们呼吁更多地关注这项必要的任务。我们的结果表明，纯粹基于视觉的感知模型，使用离散的单模态输入且没有明确的推理，可以在理想化的环境中有效地支持导航和环境理解，但不太可能成为通用的解决方案。

title: Robust and Efficient Tool Orchestration via Layered Execution Structures with Reflective Correction
summary: Tool invocation is a core capability of agentic systems, yet failures often arise not from individual tool calls but from how multiple tools are organized and executed together. Existing approaches tightly couple tool execution with stepwise language reasoning or explicit planning, leading to brittle behavior and high execution overhead. To overcome these limitations, we revisit tool invocation from the perspective of tool orchestration. Our key insight is that effective orchestration does not require precise dependency graphs or fine-grained planning. Instead, a coarse-grained layer structure suffices to provide global guidance, while execution-time errors can be corrected locally. Specifically, we model tool orchestration as learning a layered execution structure that captures high-level tool dependencies, inducing layer-wise execution through context constraints. To handle execution-time failures, we introduce a schema-aware reflective correction mechanism that detects and repairs errors locally. This design confines errors to individual tool calls and avoids re-planning entire execution trajectories. This structured execution paradigm enables a lightweight and reusable orchestration component for agentic systems. Experimental results show that our approach achieves robust tool execution while reducing execution complexity and overhead. Code will be made publicly available.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel tool orchestration method for agentic systems using layered execution structures and reflective correction, achieving robustness and efficiency by decoupling execution from rigid planning.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的工具编排方法，通过分层执行结构和反射式纠错来实现代理系统的稳健性和效率，将执行与刚性规划分离。
summary_zh: 工具调用是智能体系统的核心能力，然而故障通常并非源于单个工具调用，而是源于多个工具如何组织并协同执行。现有方法将工具执行与逐步语言推理或显式规划紧密耦合，导致行为脆弱且执行开销高。为了克服这些限制，我们从工具编排的角度重新审视工具调用。我们的关键见解是，有效的编排不需要精确的依赖图或细粒度的规划。相反，粗粒度的层结构足以提供全局指导，而执行时的错误可以在局部进行纠正。具体来说，我们将工具编排建模为学习捕获高层工具依赖关系的层状执行结构，并通过上下文约束来引导分层执行。为了处理执行时故障，我们引入了一种模式感知的反射性修正机制，可以局部检测和修复错误。这种设计将错误限制在单个工具调用中，避免了重新规划整个执行轨迹。这种结构化的执行范式为智能体系统提供了一个轻量级且可重用的编排组件。实验结果表明，我们的方法实现了稳健的工具执行，同时降低了执行复杂性和开销。代码将公开提供。

title: GS-CLIP: Zero-shot 3D Anomaly Detection by Geometry-Aware Prompt and Synergistic View Representation Learning
summary: Zero-shot 3D Anomaly Detection is an emerging task that aims to detect anomalies in a target dataset without any target training data, which is particularly important in scenarios constrained by sample scarcity and data privacy concerns. While current methods adapt CLIP by projecting 3D point clouds into 2D representations, they face challenges. The projection inherently loses some geometric details, and the reliance on a single 2D modality provides an incomplete visual understanding, limiting their ability to detect diverse anomaly types. To address these limitations, we propose the Geometry-Aware Prompt and Synergistic View Representation Learning (GS-CLIP) framework, which enables the model to identify geometric anomalies through a two-stage learning process. In stage 1, we dynamically generate text prompts embedded with 3D geometric priors. These prompts contain global shape context and local defect information distilled by our Geometric Defect Distillation Module (GDDM). In stage 2, we introduce Synergistic View Representation Learning architecture that processes rendered and depth images in parallel. A Synergistic Refinement Module (SRM) subsequently fuses the features of both streams, capitalizing on their complementary strengths. Comprehensive experimental results on four large-scale public datasets show that GS-CLIP achieves superior performance in detection. Code can be available at https://github.com/zhushengxinyue/GS-CLIP.
tldr: The paper introduces GS-CLIP, a zero-shot 3D anomaly detection framework leveraging geometry-aware prompts and synergistic view representation learning to overcome limitations of projecting 3D data into 2D for anomaly detection.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 GS-CLIP，一个零样本 3D 异常检测框架，它利用几何感知提示和协同视图表示学习来克服将 3D 数据投影到 2D 以进行异常检测的局限性。
summary_zh: 零样本3D异常检测是一项新兴任务，旨在无需任何目标训练数据的情况下检测目标数据集中的异常，这在受限于样本稀缺和数据隐私问题的场景中尤为重要。当前的方法通过将3D点云投影到2D表示来适配CLIP，但面临诸多挑战。投影固有地损失了一些几何细节，并且对单一2D模态的依赖提供了不完整的视觉理解，从而限制了它们检测各种异常类型的能力。为了解决这些局限性，我们提出了几何感知提示与协同视图表示学习（GS-CLIP）框架，该框架使模型能够通过两阶段学习过程识别几何异常。在第一阶段，我们动态生成嵌入了3D几何先验的文本提示。这些提示包含由我们的几何缺陷提炼模块（GDDM）提炼的全局形状上下文和局部缺陷信息。在第二阶段，我们引入了协同视图表示学习架构，该架构并行处理渲染图像和深度图像。协同精炼模块（SRM）随后融合了两个流的特征，从而利用了它们互补的优势。在四个大规模公共数据集上的综合实验结果表明，GS-CLIP在检测方面实现了卓越的性能。代码可在https://github.com/zhushengxinyue/GS-CLIP获取。

title: VLM-Guided Group Preference Alignment for Diffusion-based Human Mesh Recovery
summary: Human mesh recovery (HMR) from a single RGB image is inherently ambiguous, as multiple 3D poses can correspond to the same 2D observation. Recent diffusion-based methods tackle this by generating various hypotheses, but often sacrifice accuracy. They yield predictions that are either physically implausible or drift from the input image, especially under occlusion or in cluttered, in-the-wild scenes. To address this, we introduce a dual-memory augmented HMR critique agent with self-reflection to produce context-aware quality scores for predicted meshes. These scores distill fine-grained cues about 3D human motion structure, physical feasibility, and alignment with the input image. We use these scores to build a group-wise HMR preference dataset. Leveraging this dataset, we propose a group preference alignment framework for finetuning diffusion-based HMR models. This process injects the rich preference signals into the model, guiding it to generate more physically plausible and image-consistent human meshes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance compared to state-of-the-art approaches.
tldr: The paper proposes a method to improve diffusion-based Human Mesh Recovery by using a critique agent and group preference alignment to generate more physically plausible and image-consistent human meshes.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种改进基于扩散的人体网格重建的方法，通过使用评论代理和群体偏好对齐，生成更符合物理规律和图像一致性的人体网格。
summary_zh: 单张RGB图像的人体网格重建（HMR）本质上是含糊不清的，因为多个3D姿势可能对应于相同的2D观测。最近基于扩散的方法通过生成各种假设来解决这个问题，但往往牺牲了准确性。它们产生的预测结果要么在物理上不可信，要么偏离输入图像，尤其是在遮挡或杂乱的真实场景中。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种双记忆增强型HMR评论代理，通过自我反思来为预测的网格生成上下文感知的质量评分。这些评分提取了关于3D人体运动结构、物理可行性以及与输入图像对齐的细粒度线索。我们使用这些评分构建了一个组别式HMR偏好数据集。利用这个数据集，我们提出了一种用于微调基于扩散的HMR模型的组偏好对齐框架。这个过程将丰富的偏好信号注入到模型中，引导模型生成更符合物理规律且与图像一致的人体网格。大量的实验表明，我们的方法与最先进的方法相比，实现了卓越的性能。

title: OpenVO: Open-World Visual Odometry with Temporal Dynamics Awareness
summary: We introduce OpenVO, a novel framework for Open-world Visual Odometry (VO) with temporal awareness under limited input conditions. OpenVO effectively estimates real-world-scale ego-motion from monocular dashcam footage with varying observation rates and uncalibrated cameras, enabling robust trajectory dataset construction from rare driving events recorded in dashcam. Existing VO methods are trained on fixed observation frequency (e.g., 10Hz or 12Hz), completely overlooking temporal dynamics information. Many prior methods also require calibrated cameras with known intrinsic parameters. Consequently, their performance degrades when (1) deployed under unseen observation frequencies or (2) applied to uncalibrated cameras. These significantly limit their generalizability to many downstream tasks, such as extracting trajectories from dashcam footage. To address these challenges, OpenVO (1) explicitly encodes temporal dynamics information within a two-frame pose regression framework and (2) leverages 3D geometric priors derived from foundation models. We validate our method on three major autonomous-driving benchmarks - KITTI, nuScenes, and Argoverse 2 - achieving more than 20 performance improvement over state-of-the-art approaches. Under varying observation rate settings, our method is significantly more robust, achieving 46%-92% lower errors across all metrics. These results demonstrate the versatility of OpenVO for real-world 3D reconstruction and diverse downstream applications.
tldr: OpenVO is a new visual odometry framework that improves ego-motion estimation from monocular dashcam footage with varying frame rates and uncalibrated cameras by encoding temporal dynamics and leveraging 3D geometric priors, achieving significant performance gains on standard datasets.
tldr_zh: OpenVO是一个新的视觉里程计框架，通过编码时间动态和利用3D几何先验，提高了从具有变化帧率和未校准的单目行车记录仪视频中的自我运动估计，并在标准数据集上取得了显著的性能提升。
summary_zh: 我们提出了OpenVO，一个新颖的开放世界视觉里程计（VO）框架，能够在有限的输入条件下感知时间信息。OpenVO能够有效估计来自单目行车记录仪视频的真实尺度自运动，视频具有不同的观测频率和未经标定的相机，从而能够从行车记录仪中记录的罕见驾驶事件中构建稳健的轨迹数据集。现有的VO方法在固定的观测频率（例如，10Hz或12Hz）下进行训练，完全忽略了时间动态信息。许多先前的方法还需要已知内参的标定相机。因此，当（1）部署在未见过的观测频率下或（2）应用于未经标定的相机时，它们的性能会下降。这些显著限制了它们对许多下游任务的泛化能力，例如从行车记录仪视频中提取轨迹。为了应对这些挑战，OpenVO（1）在一个双帧姿态回归框架中显式地编码时间动态信息，并且（2）利用从基础模型导出的3D几何先验。我们在三个主要的自动驾驶基准测试数据集——KITTI、nuScenes和Argoverse 2——上验证了我们的方法，相比最先进的方法，实现了超过 20% 的性能提升。在不同的观测速率设置下，我们的方法明显更具鲁棒性，在所有指标上的误差降低了46%-92%。这些结果证明了 OpenVO 在真实世界3D重建和各种下游应用中的多功能性。

title: MoBind: Motion Binding for Fine-Grained IMU-Video Pose Alignment
summary: We aim to learn a joint representation between inertial measurement unit (IMU) signals and 2D pose sequences extracted from video, enabling accurate cross-modal retrieval, temporal synchronization, subject and body-part localization, and action recognition. To this end, we introduce MoBind, a hierarchical contrastive learning framework designed to address three challenges: (1) filtering out irrelevant visual background, (2) modeling structured multi-sensor IMU configurations, and (3) achieving fine-grained, sub-second temporal alignment. To isolate motion-relevant cues, MoBind aligns IMU signals with skeletal motion sequences rather than raw pixels. We further decompose full-body motion into local body-part trajectories, pairing each with its corresponding IMU to enable semantically grounded multi-sensor alignment. To capture detailed temporal correspondence, MoBind employs a hierarchical contrastive strategy that first aligns token-level temporal segments, then fuses local (body-part) alignment with global (body-wide) motion aggregation. Evaluated on mRi, TotalCapture, and EgoHumans, MoBind consistently outperforms strong baselines across all four tasks, demonstrating robust fine-grained temporal alignment while preserving coarse semantic consistency across modalities. Code is available at https://github.com/bbvisual/ MoBind.
tldr: The paper introduces MoBind, a hierarchical contrastive learning framework for aligning IMU signals and video-extracted 2D poses, enabling fine-grained cross-modal retrieval, synchronization, and action recognition by focusing on motion-relevant cues and structured multi-sensor configurations.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了MoBind，一种分层对比学习框架，用于对齐IMU信号和视频提取的2D姿势，通过关注运动相关的线索和结构化的多传感器配置，实现细粒度的跨模态检索、同步和动作识别。
summary_zh: 我们旨在学习惯性测量单元（IMU）信号与从视频中提取的2D姿态序列之间的联合表征，从而实现精确的跨模态检索、时间同步、对象和身体部位定位以及动作识别。 为此，我们引入了MoBind，这是一个分层对比学习框架，旨在应对三个挑战： (1) 过滤掉无关的视觉背景，(2) 建模结构化的多传感器IMU配置，以及 (3) 实现精细化的、亚秒级的时间对齐。 为了隔离与运动相关的线索，MoBind将IMU信号与骨骼运动序列而非原始像素对齐。 我们进一步将全身运动分解为局部身体部位轨迹，将每个轨迹与其相应的IMU配对，以实现语义相关的多传感器对齐。 为了捕捉详细的时间对应关系，MoBind 采用了一种分层对比策略，该策略首先对齐令牌级的时间段，然后将局部（身体部位）对齐与全局（全身范围）运动聚合融合。 在 mRi、TotalCapture 和 EgoHumans 数据集上进行的评估表明，MoBind 在所有四项任务中均始终优于强大的基线模型，证明了其鲁棒的精细化时间对齐能力，同时保留了跨模态的粗略语义一致性。 代码可在 https://github.com/bbvisual/ MoBind 获取。

title: Learning Cross-View Object Correspondence via Cycle-Consistent Mask Prediction
summary: We study the task of establishing object-level visual correspondence across different viewpoints in videos, focusing on the challenging egocentric-to-exocentric and exocentric-to-egocentric scenarios. We propose a simple yet effective framework based on conditional binary segmentation, where an object query mask is encoded into a latent representation to guide the localization of the corresponding object in a target video. To encourage robust, view-invariant representations, we introduce a cycle-consistency training objective: the predicted mask in the target view is projected back to the source view to reconstruct the original query mask. This bidirectional constraint provides a strong self-supervisory signal without requiring ground-truth annotations and enables test-time training (TTT) at inference. Experiments on the Ego-Exo4D and HANDAL-X benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our optimization objective and TTT strategy, achieving state-of-the-art performance. The code is available at https://github.com/shannany0606/CCMP.
tldr: This paper presents a cycle-consistency based method for learning object correspondence between different viewpoints in videos, demonstrating SOTA performance on Ego-Exo4D and HANDAL-X benchmarks and introducing a test-time training strategy.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于循环一致性的方法，用于学习视频中不同视点之间的物体 correspondence，并在 Ego-Exo4D 和 HANDAL-X 基准测试上实现了 SOTA 性能，并介绍了一种测试时训练策略。
summary_zh: 我们研究了在视频中跨不同视角建立对象级视觉对应关系的任务，重点关注具有挑战性的第一人称视角到第三人称视角以及第三人称视角到第一人称视角的场景。我们提出了一种简单而有效的基于条件二元分割的框架，其中对象查询掩码被编码成一个潜在表示，以指导目标视频中相应对象的定位。为了鼓励稳健的、视角不变的表示，我们引入了一个循环一致性训练目标：目标视角中预测的掩码被反向投影到源视角以重建原始查询掩码。这种双向约束提供了一个强大的自监督信号，无需真实标签，并支持推理时的测试时训练 (TTT)。在 Ego-Exo4D 和 HANDAL-X 基准测试上的实验表明了我们的优化目标和 TTT 策略的有效性，实现了最先进的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/shannany0606/CCMP 获取。

title: IDSelect: A RL-Based Cost-Aware Selection Agent for Video-based Multi-Modal Person Recognition
summary: Video-based person recognition achieves robust identification by integrating face, body, and gait. However, current systems waste computational resources by processing all modalities with fixed heavyweight ensembles regardless of input complexity. To address these limitations, we propose IDSelect, a reinforcement learning-based cost-aware selector that chooses one pre-trained model per modality per-sequence to optimize the accuracy-efficiency trade-off. Our key insight is that an input-conditioned selector can discover complementary model choices that surpass fixed ensembles while using substantially fewer resources. IDSelect trains a lightweight agent end-to-end using actor-critic reinforcement learning with budget-aware optimization. The reward balances recognition accuracy with computational cost, while entropy regularization prevents premature convergence. At inference, the policy selects the most probable model per modality and fuses modality-specific similarities for the final score. Extensive experiments on challenging video-based datasets demonstrate IDSelect's superior efficiency: on CCVID, it achieves 95.9% Rank-1 accuracy with 92.4% less computation than strong baselines while improving accuracy by 1.8%; on MEVID, it reduces computation by 41.3% while maintaining competitive performance.
tldr: The paper introduces IDSelect, a reinforcement learning-based approach for dynamically selecting modality-specific models in video-based person recognition to optimize accuracy and computational cost, achieving significant efficiency gains.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了IDSelect，一种基于强化学习的方法，用于在基于视频的行人识别中动态选择特定模态的模型，以优化准确性和计算成本，并实现了显著的效率提升。
summary_zh: 基于视频的人员识别通过整合面部、身体和步态实现稳健的身份识别。然而，当前的系统不考虑输入复杂度，采用固定的重量级集成模型处理所有模态，造成计算资源的浪费。为了解决这些局限性，我们提出IDSelect，一种基于强化学习的成本敏感选择器，它为每个序列的每个模态选择一个预训练模型，以优化准确率-效率的权衡。我们的关键在于，一个输入条件的选择器可以发现互补模型选择，超越固定集成模型，同时使用更少的资源。IDSelect使用演员-评论家强化学习框架端到端地训练一个轻量级代理，并采用预算感知的优化方法。奖励函数平衡了识别准确率和计算成本，同时熵正则化防止了过早收敛。在推理阶段，该策略选择每个模态最可能的模型，并融合模态特定的相似度以获得最终的分数。在具有挑战性的视频数据集上的大量实验表明，IDSelect具有卓越的效率：在CCVID数据集上，它实现了95.9%的Rank-1准确率，计算量比强大的基线降低了92.4%，同时提高了1.8%的准确率；在MEVID数据集上，它将计算量降低了41.3%，同时保持了有竞争力的性能。

title: Adaptive Problem Generation via Symbolic Representations
summary: We present a method for generating training data for reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards to improve small open-weights language models on mathematical tasks. Existing data generation approaches rely on open-loop pipelines and fixed modifications that do not adapt to the model's capabilities. Furthermore, they typically operate directly on word problems, limiting control over problem structure. To address this, we perform modifications in a symbolic problem space, representing each problem as a set of symbolic variables and constraints (e.g., via algebraic frameworks such as SymPy or SMT formulations). This representation enables precise control over problem structure, automatic generation of ground-truth solutions, and decouples mathematical reasoning from linguistic realization. We also show that this results in more diverse generations. To adapt the problem difficulty to the model, we introduce a closed-loop framework that learns modification strategies through prompt optimization in symbolic space. Experimental results demonstrate that both adaptive problem generation and symbolic representation modifications contribute to improving the model's math solving ability.
tldr: The paper introduces an adaptive problem generation method using symbolic representations to improve the math solving abilities of small language models through reinforcement learning. It uses a closed-loop framework with prompt optimization in symbolic space.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种自适应问题生成方法，使用符号表示，通过强化学习来提高小型语言模型的数学解题能力。它使用闭环框架，在符号空间里进行提示优化。
summary_zh: 我们提出了一种为强化学习生成具有可验证奖励的训练数据的方法，以提高小型开放权重语言模型在数学任务上的表现。 现有的数据生成方法依赖于开环管道和固定的修改，无法适应模型的能力。此外，它们通常直接对文字题进行操作，限制了对问题结构的控制。 为了解决这个问题，我们在符号问题空间中执行修改，将每个问题表示为一组符号变量和约束（例如，通过代数框架如SymPy或SMT公式）。 这种表示可以精确控制问题结构，自动生成真值解，并将数学推理与语言表达分离。 我们还表明，这会产生更多样化的生成结果。 为了使问题难度适应模型，我们引入了一个闭环框架，该框架通过在符号空间中进行提示优化来学习修改策略。 实验结果表明，自适应问题生成和符号表示修改都有助于提高模型的数学解题能力。

title: Distributional Stability of Tangent-Linearized Gaussian Inference on Smooth Manifolds
summary: Gaussian inference on smooth manifolds is central to robotics, but exact marginalization and conditioning are generally non-Gaussian and geometry-dependent. We study tangent-linearized Gaussian inference and derive explicit non-asymptotic $W_2$ stability bounds for projection marginalization and surface-measure conditioning. The bounds separate local second-order geometric distortion from nonlocal tail leakage and, for Gaussian inputs, yield closed-form diagnostics from $(μ,Σ)$ and curvature/reach surrogates. Circle and planar-pushing experiments validate the predicted calibration transition near $\sqrt{\|Σ\|_{\mathrm{op}}}/R\approx 1/6$ and indicate that normal-direction uncertainty is the dominant failure mode when locality breaks. These diagnostics provide practical triggers for switching from single-chart linearization to multi-chart or sample-based manifold inference.
tldr: The paper analyzes the stability of tangent-linearized Gaussian inference on smooth manifolds, providing practical diagnostics for switching to more complex manifold inference methods in robotics applications when single-chart linearization becomes unreliable.
tldr_zh: 本文分析了光滑流形上切线线性化高斯推断的稳定性，为在机器人应用中，当单图线性化变得不可靠时，切换到更复杂的流形推断方法提供了实用的诊断。
summary_zh: 对光滑流形上的高斯推断是机器人学的核心，但精确的边缘化和条件化通常是非高斯的，且与几何结构相关。我们研究了切线线性化高斯推断，并推导出投影边缘化和表面测度条件化的显式非渐近$W_2$稳定性界。这些界将局部二阶几何畸变与非局部尾部泄露分离，并且对于高斯输入，可以从$(μ,Σ)$和曲率/可达性替代物中获得闭合形式诊断。圆形和平面推拉实验验证了预测的校准过渡发生在$\sqrt{\|Σ\|_{\mathrm{op}}}/R\approx 1/6$附近，并表明当局部性破坏时，法线方向的不确定性是主要的失效模式。这些诊断为从单图线性化切换到多图或基于样本的流形推断提供了实际的触发条件。

title: Distributed and Consistent Multi-Robot Visual-Inertial-Ranging Odometry on Lie Groups
summary: Reliable localization is a fundamental requirement for multi-robot systems operating in GPS-denied environments. Visual-inertial odometry (VIO) provides lightweight and accurate motion estimation but suffers from cumulative drift in the absence of global references. Ultra-wideband (UWB) ranging offers complementary global observations, yet most existing UWB-aided VIO methods are designed for single-robot scenarios and rely on pre-calibrated anchors, which limits their robustness in practice. This paper proposes a distributed collaborative visual-inertial-ranging odometry (DC-VIRO) framework that tightly fuses VIO and UWB measurements across multiple robots. Anchor positions are explicitly included in the system state to address calibration uncertainty, while shared anchor observations are exploited through inter-robot communication to provide additional geometric constraints. By leveraging a right-invariant error formulation on Lie groups, the proposed approach preserves the observability properties of standard VIO, ensuring estimator consistency. Simulation results with multiple robots demonstrate that DC-VIRO significantly improves localization accuracy and robustness, while simultaneously enabling anchor self-calibration in distributed settings.
tldr: This paper introduces a distributed collaborative visual-inertial-ranging odometry (DC-VIRO) framework for multi-robot systems that tightly fuses VIO and UWB measurements, addressing localization accuracy and robustness in GPS-denied environments and enabling anchor self-calibration.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种分布式协作的视觉惯性测距里程计（DC-VIRO）框架，用于多机器人系统，该框架紧密融合了VIO和UWB测量数据，解决了在无GPS环境中的定位精度和鲁棒性问题，并支持传感器自校准。
summary_zh: 可靠的定位是在无GPS环境中运行的多机器人系统的基本要求。视觉惯性里程计(VIO)提供轻量且精确的运动估计，但在缺乏全局参考时会受到累积漂移的影响。超宽带(UWB)测距提供互补的全局观测，然而大多数现有的UWB辅助VIO方法是为单机器人场景设计的，并依赖于预先校准的锚点，这限制了它们在实践中的鲁棒性。本文提出了一种分布式协作视觉惯性测距里程计(DC-VIRO)框架，该框架紧耦合了多个机器人之间的VIO和UWB测量数据。锚点位置被显式地包含在系统状态中，以解决校准不确定性，而共享的锚点观测通过机器人间的通信被利用，从而提供额外的几何约束。通过利用李群上的右不变误差公式，所提出的方法保留了标准VIO的可观测性特性，从而确保估计器的一致性。多机器人的仿真结果表明，DC-VIRO显著提高了定位精度和鲁棒性，同时实现了分布式环境中的锚点自校准。

title: Understanding Fire Through Thermal Radiation Fields for Mobile Robots
summary: Safely moving through environments affected by fire is a critical capability for autonomous mobile robots deployed in disaster response. In this work, we present a novel approach for mobile robots to understand fire through building real-time thermal radiation fields. We register depth and thermal images to obtain a 3D point cloud annotated with temperature values. From these data, we identify fires and use the Stefan-Boltzmann law to approximate the thermal radiation in empty spaces. This enables the construction of a continuous thermal radiation field over the environment. We show that this representation can be used for robot navigation, where we embed thermal constraints into the cost map to compute collision-free and thermally safe paths. We validate our approach on a Boston Dynamics Spot robot in controlled experimental settings. Our experiments demonstrate the robot's ability to avoid hazardous regions while still reaching navigation goals. Our approach paves the way toward mobile robots that can be autonomously deployed in fire-affected environments, with potential applications in search-and-rescue, firefighting, and hazardous material response.
tldr: This paper presents a method for mobile robots to navigate fire-affected environments by constructing real-time thermal radiation fields from depth and thermal images, enabling thermally safe path planning.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种移动机器人在火灾环境中导航的方法，通过深度和热图像构建实时热辐射场，从而实现热安全的路径规划。
summary_zh: 在受火灾影响的环境中安全移动是部署于灾难响应中的自主移动机器人的关键能力。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，使移动机器人能够通过构建实时热辐射场来理解火灾。我们注册深度图像和热图像以获得带有温度值注释的 3D 点云。 从这些数据中，我们识别火源并使用斯特藩-玻尔兹曼定律来近似估计空旷空间中的热辐射。 这使得能够在环境中构建连续的热辐射场。我们证明了这种表达方式可用于机器人导航，其中我们将热约束嵌入到代价地图中，以计算出无碰撞且热安全的路径。我们在 Boston Dynamics Spot 机器人上，在受控实验环境中验证了我们的方法。我们的实验表明了机器人避开危险区域同时仍能到达导航目标的能力。 我们的方法为自主部署在火灾影响环境中的移动机器人铺平了道路，并在搜索和救援、消防和危险材料响应方面具有潜在应用。

title: TeFlow: Enabling Multi-frame Supervision for Self-Supervised Feed-forward Scene Flow Estimation
summary: Self-supervised feed-forward methods for scene flow estimation offer real-time efficiency, but their supervision from two-frame point correspondences is unreliable and often breaks down under occlusions. Multi-frame supervision has the potential to provide more stable guidance by incorporating motion cues from past frames, yet naive extensions of two-frame objectives are ineffective because point correspondences vary abruptly across frames, producing inconsistent signals. In the paper, we present TeFlow, enabling multi-frame supervision for feed-forward models by mining temporally consistent supervision. TeFlow introduces a temporal ensembling strategy that forms reliable supervisory signals by aggregating the most temporally consistent motion cues from a candidate pool built across multiple frames. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that TeFlow establishes a new state-of-the-art for self-supervised feed-forward methods, achieving performance gains of up to 33\% on the challenging Argoverse 2 and nuScenes datasets. Our method performs on par with leading optimization-based methods, yet speeds up 150 times. The code is open-sourced at https://github.com/KTH-RPL/OpenSceneFlow along with trained model weights.
tldr: TeFlow introduces a temporal ensembling strategy for self-supervised scene flow estimation, achieving state-of-the-art performance while maintaining feed-forward efficiency.
tldr_zh: TeFlow 引入了一种用于自监督场景流估计的时间集成策略，在保持前馈效率的同时实现了最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 用于场景流估计的自监督前馈方法具有实时的效率，但它们来自双帧点对应关系的监督是不可靠的，并且在遮挡下经常失效。 多帧监督有潜力通过结合来自过去帧的运动线索来提供更稳定的指导，然而，双帧目标的简单扩展是无效的，因为点对应关系在帧间会突然变化，产生不一致的信号。 在本文中，我们提出了TeFlow，通过挖掘时间上一致的监督，为前馈模型启用多帧监督。 TeFlow引入了一种时间集成策略，通过聚合从跨多个帧构建的候选池中最具时间一致性的运动线索，来形成可靠的监督信号。 大量的评估表明，TeFlow为自监督前馈方法建立了一个新的最先进水平，在具有挑战性的Argoverse 2和nuScenes数据集上实现了高达33%的性能提升。 我们的方法与领先的基于优化的方法性能相当，但速度提高了150倍。 代码和训练好的模型权重已在https://github.com/KTH-RPL/OpenSceneFlow中开源。

title: FruitTouch: A Perceptive Gripper for Gentle and Scalable Fruit Harvesting
summary: The automation of fruit harvesting has gained increasing significance in response to rising labor shortages. A sensorized gripper is a key component of this process, which must be compact enough for confined spaces, able to stably grasp diverse fruits, and provide reliable feedback on fruit conditions for efficient harvesting. To address this need, we propose FruitTouch, a compact gripper that integrates high-resolution, vision-based tactile sensing through an optimized optical design. This configuration accommodates a wide range of fruit sizes while maintaining low cost and mechanical simplicity. Tactile images captured by an embedded camera provide rich information for real-time force estimation, slip detection, and softness prediction. We validate the gripper in real-world fruit harvesting experiments, demonstrating robust grasp stability and effective damage prevention.
tldr: The paper presents FruitTouch, a compact, sensorized gripper for fruit harvesting, integrating vision-based tactile sensing for force estimation, slip detection, and softness prediction, validated in real-world experiments.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为FruitTouch的紧凑型传感器夹爪，用于水果采摘。它集成了基于视觉的触觉传感，用于力估计、滑移检测和软度预测，并在真实世界的实验中得到了验证。
summary_zh:
摘要：
为应对日益增长的劳动力短缺问题，水果采摘自动化变得越来越重要。 传感器化的夹爪是此过程的关键组成部分，它必须足够紧凑以适应狭窄空间，能够稳定地抓取各种水果，并提供关于水果状况的可靠反馈以实现高效采摘。 为了满足这一需求，我们提出了一种紧凑型夹爪FruitTouch，它通过优化的光学设计集成了高分辨率的基于视觉的触觉感知。 此配置能够适应各种尺寸的水果，同时保持低成本和机械简洁性。 嵌入式摄像头捕获的触觉图像提供了丰富的实时力估计、滑移检测和软度预测的信息。 我们通过真实的果实采摘实验验证了该夹爪，证明了其强大的抓取稳定性和有效的损伤预防能力。

title: Bumper Drone: Elastic Morphology Design for Aerial Physical Interaction
summary: Aerial robots are evolving from avoiding obstacles to exploiting the environmental contact interactions for navigation, exploration and manipulation. A key challenge in such aerial physical interactions lies in handling uncertain contact forces on unknown targets, which typically demand accurate sensing and active control. We present a drone platform with elastic horns that enables touch-and-go manoeuvres - a self-regulated, consecutive bumping motion that allows the drone to maintain proximity to a wall without relying on active obstacle avoidance. It leverages environmental interaction as a form of embodied control, where low-level stabilisation and near-obstacle navigation emerge from the passive dynamic responses of the drone-obstacle system that resembles a mass-spring-damper system. Experiments show that the elastic horn can absorb impact energy while maintaining vehicle stability, reducing pitch oscillations by 38% compared to the rigid horn configuration. The lower horn arrangement was found to reduce pitch oscillations by approximately 54%. In addition to intermittent contact, the platform equipped with elastic horns also demonstrates stable, sustained contact with static objects, relying on a standard attitude PID controller.
tldr: This paper presents a drone with elastic horns designed for aerial physical interaction, enabling stable touch-and-go maneuvers and sustained contact with objects without relying on active obstacle avoidance, offering improved stability compared to rigid horns.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种带有弹性角翼的无人机，旨在实现空中物理交互，使其能够稳定地进行接触式飞行和与物体的持续接触，而无需依赖主动避障，与刚性角翼相比，稳定性有所提高。
summary_zh: 无人机正从避开障碍物发展到利用环境接触交互进行导航、探索和操作。在此类空中物理交互中，一个关键挑战在于处理未知目标上不确定的接触力，这通常需要精确的传感和主动控制。我们提出了一种带有弹性角的无人机平台，该平台能够实现触碰即走动作——一种自我调节的连续碰撞运动，使无人机能够在不依赖主动避障的情况下保持与墙壁的接近。它利用环境交互作为一种具身控制形式，其中低层稳定和近障碍物导航源于无人机-障碍物系统的被动动态响应，该系统类似于一个 mass-spring-damper（质量-弹簧-阻尼器）系统。实验表明，弹性角能够吸收冲击能量并保持飞行器稳定性，与刚性角配置相比，俯仰振荡降低了 38%。实验发现，较低的角部布置能够将俯仰振荡降低大约 54%。除了间歇性接触外，该平台在配备弹性角的情况下，还能依靠标准的姿态 PID 控制器，实现与静态物体的稳定、持续接触。

title: Temporal-Logic-Aware Frontier-Based Exploration
summary: This paper addresses the problem of temporal logic motion planning for an autonomous robot operating in an unknown environment. The objective is to enable the robot to satisfy a syntactically co-safe Linear Temporal Logic (scLTL) specification when the exact locations of the desired labels are not known a priori. We introduce a new type of automaton state, referred to as commit states. These states capture intermediate task progress resulting from actions whose consequences are irreversible. In other words, certain future paths to satisfaction become not feasible after taking those actions that lead to the commit states. By leveraging commit states, we propose a sound and complete frontier-based exploration algorithm that strategically guides the robot to make progress toward the task while preserving all possible ways of satisfying it. The efficacy of the proposed method is validated through simulations.
tldr: The paper introduces a frontier-based exploration algorithm using 'commit states' to guide robots in unknown environments towards satisfying syntactically co-safe Linear Temporal Logic (scLTL) specifications. The algorithm ensures progress while preserving task satisfaction possibilities.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于前沿探索的算法，利用“提交状态”引导机器人在未知环境中满足句法上协同安全的线性时序逻辑（scLTL）规范。 该算法确保在取得进展的同时，保持任务满足的可能性。
summary_zh: 本文研究了在未知环境中自主机器人进行时序逻辑运动规划的问题。目标是使机器人满足语法上安全的线性时序逻辑（scLTL）规范，同时预先未知所需标签的精确位置。我们引入了一种新型的自动机状态，称为提交状态。这些状态捕捉了由于采取不可逆转的动作而产生的中间任务进展。换句话说，在采取导致提交状态的动作后，某些满足任务的未来路径将变得不可行。通过利用提交状态，我们提出了一种可靠且完备的基于边界的探索算法，该算法战略性地引导机器人向任务进展，同时保留所有可能的满足任务的方式。通过仿真验证了该方法的有效性。

title: DGPO: RL-Steered Graph Diffusion for Neural Architecture Generation
summary: Reinforcement learning fine-tuning has proven effective for steering generative diffusion models toward desired properties in image and molecular domains. Graph diffusion models have similarly been applied to combinatorial structure generation, including neural architecture search (NAS). However, neural architectures are directed acyclic graphs (DAGs) where edge direction encodes functional semantics such as data flow-information that existing graph diffusion methods, designed for undirected structures, discard. We propose Directed Graph Policy Optimization (DGPO), which extends reinforcement learning fine-tuning of discrete graph diffusion models to DAGs via topological node ordering and positional encoding. Validated on NAS-Bench-101 and NAS-Bench-201, DGPO matches the benchmark optimum on all three NAS-Bench-201 tasks (91.61%, 73.49%, 46.77%). The central finding is that the model learns transferable structural priors: pretrained on only 7% of the search space, it generates near-oracle architectures after fine-tuning, within 0.32 percentage points of the full-data model and extrapolating 7.3 percentage points beyond its training ceiling. Bidirectional control experiments confirm genuine reward-driven steering, with inverse optimization reaching near random-chance accuracy (9.5%). These results demonstrate that reinforcement learning-steered discrete diffusion, once extended to handle directionality, provides a controllable generative framework for directed combinatorial structures.
tldr: The paper introduces Directed Graph Policy Optimization (DGPO), a reinforcement learning-steered graph diffusion model for generating neural architectures (DAGs), demonstrating strong performance on NAS-Bench benchmarks and transferable structural priors.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了有向图策略优化 (DGPO)，一种强化学习引导的图扩散模型，用于生成神经架构（DAG），并在 NAS-Bench 基准测试中展示了强大的性能和可转移的结构先验。
summary_zh: 强化学习微调已被证明可有效引导生成式扩散模型在图像和分子领域朝着期望的属性发展。图扩散模型也被类似地应用于组合结构生成，包括神经架构搜索（NAS）。然而，神经架构是有向无环图（DAG），其中边的方向编码了诸如数据流这样的功能语义——而现有的图扩散方法是为无向结构设计的，会丢弃这些信息。我们提出了有向图策略优化（DGPO），它通过拓扑节点排序和位置编码，将离散图扩散模型的强化学习微调扩展到DAG。在NAS-Bench-101和NAS-Bench-201上的验证表明，DGPO在所有三个NAS-Bench-201任务中都达到了基准最优（91.61%、73.49%、46.77%）。核心发现是该模型学习了可迁移的结构先验：仅在7%的搜索空间上进行预训练后，它就能在微调后生成接近最优的架构，与全数据模型相差不到0.32个百分点，并将其训练上限外推7.3个百分点。双向控制实验证实是真正的奖励驱动引导，逆向优化达到了接近随机概率的精度（9.5%）。这些结果表明，一旦扩展到处理方向性，强化学习引导的离散扩散就为有向组合结构提供了一个可控的生成框架。

title: Robust Exploration in Directed Controller Synthesis via Reinforcement Learning with Soft Mixture-of-Experts
summary: On-the-fly Directed Controller Synthesis (OTF-DCS) mitigates state-space explosion by incrementally exploring the system and relies critically on an exploration policy to guide search efficiently. Recent reinforcement learning (RL) approaches learn such policies and achieve promising zero-shot generalization from small training instances to larger unseen ones. However, a fundamental limitation is anisotropic generalization, where an RL policy exhibits strong performance only in a specific region of the domain-parameter space while remaining fragile elsewhere due to training stochasticity and trajectory-dependent bias. To address this, we propose a Soft Mixture-of-Experts framework that combines multiple RL experts via a prior-confidence gating mechanism and treats these anisotropic behaviors as complementary specializations. The evaluation on the Air Traffic benchmark shows that Soft-MoE substantially expands the solvable parameter space and improves robustness compared to any single expert.
tldr: The paper introduces a Soft Mixture-of-Experts framework to improve the robustness of reinforcement learning policies used for on-the-fly directed controller synthesis, addressing the issue of anisotropic generalization.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种软混合专家框架，旨在提高用于飞行中定向控制器合成的强化学习策略的鲁棒性，解决了各向异性泛化问题。
summary_zh: 动态导向控制器合成（OTF-DCS）通过增量式探索系统来缓解状态空间爆炸问题，并严重依赖于探索策略来高效地引导搜索。最近的强化学习（RL）方法学习此类策略，并实现了从小型训练实例到大型未见实例的有希望的零样本泛化。然而，一个根本的局限性是各向异性泛化，即RL策略仅在领域参数空间的特定区域表现出强大的性能，但在其他地方由于训练的随机性和轨迹依赖性偏差而仍然脆弱。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个软性混合专家框架，该框架通过先验置信度门控机制组合多个RL专家，并将这些各向异性行为视为互补的专业化。在空中交通基准测试上的评估表明，与任何单个专家相比，软性混合专家框架(Soft-MoE) 显着扩展了可解参数空间并提高了鲁棒性。

title: High Dimensional Procedural Content Generation
summary: Procedural content generation (PCG) has made substantial progress in shaping static 2D/3D geometry, while most methods treat gameplay mechanics as auxiliary and optimize only over space. We argue that this limits controllability and expressivity, and formally introduce High-Dimensional PCG (HDPCG): a framework that elevates non-geometric gameplay dimensions to first-class coordinates of a joint state space. We instantiate HDPCG along two concrete directions. Direction-Space augments geometry with a discrete layer dimension and validates reachability in 4D (x,y,z,l), enabling unified treatment of 2.5D/3.5D mechanics such as gravity inversion and parallel-world switching. Direction-Time augments geometry with temporal dynamics via time-expanded graphs, capturing action semantics and conflict rules. For each direction, we present three general, practicable algorithms with a shared pipeline of abstract skeleton generation, controlled grounding, high-dimensional validation, and multi-metric evaluation. Large-scale experiments across diverse settings validate the integrity of our problem formulation and the effectiveness of our methods on playability, structure, style, robustness, and efficiency. Beyond quantitative results, Unity-based case studies recreate playable scenarios that accord with our metrics. We hope HDPCG encourages a shift in PCG toward general representations and the generation of gameplay-relevant dimensions beyond geometry, paving the way for controllable, verifiable, and extensible level generation.
tldr: The paper introduces High-Dimensional PCG (HDPCG), a framework that extends procedural content generation beyond geometry, incorporating gameplay mechanics as first-class coordinates in a joint state space and demonstrating its effectiveness with various algorithms and Unity-based case studies.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了高维程序内容生成 (HDPCG) 框架，该框架将程序内容生成扩展到几何之外，将游戏机制作为联合状态空间中的一流坐标纳入，并通过各种算法和基于 Unity 的案例研究证明了其有效性。
summary_zh: 程序化内容生成(PCG)在塑造静态2D/3D几何体方面取得了显著进展，但大多数方法将游戏机制视为辅助手段，仅在空间维度上进行优化。我们认为这限制了可控性和表现力，并正式引入了高维PCG(HDPCG)：一个将非几何游戏维度提升为联合状态空间中一等坐标的框架。我们沿着两个具体方向实例化HDPCG。方向-空间通过离散的层维度增强了几何体，并在4D空间(x,y,z,l)中验证了可达性，从而能够统一处理2.5D/3.5D机制，例如重力反转和平行世界切换。方向-时间通过时间扩展图将几何体与时间动态相结合，捕捉动作语义和冲突规则。对于每个方向，我们提出了三种通用、可行的算法，具有共享的抽象骨架生成、受控接地、高维验证和多指标评估的流水线。跨越各种场景的大规模实验验证了我们问题表述的完整性以及我们方法在可玩性、结构、风格、鲁棒性和效率方面的有效性。除了量化结果之外，基于Unity的案例研究重新创建了符合我们指标的可玩场景。我们希望HDPCG能够鼓励PCG向通用表示和生成超越几何体的游戏相关维度转变，为可控、可验证和可扩展的关卡生成铺平道路。

title: UniE2F: A Unified Diffusion Framework for Event-to-Frame Reconstruction with Video Foundation Models
summary: Event cameras excel at high-speed, low-power, and high-dynamic-range scene perception. However, as they fundamentally record only relative intensity changes rather than absolute intensity, the resulting data streams suffer from a significant loss of spatial information and static texture details. In this paper, we address this limitation by leveraging the generative prior of a pre-trained video diffusion model to reconstruct high-fidelity video frames from sparse event data. Specifically, we first establish a baseline model by directly applying event data as a condition to synthesize videos. Then, based on the physical correlation between the event stream and video frames, we further introduce the event-based inter-frame residual guidance to enhance the accuracy of video frame reconstruction. Furthermore, we extend our method to video frame interpolation and prediction in a zero-shot manner by modulating the reverse diffusion sampling process, thereby creating a unified event-to-frame reconstruction framework. Experimental results on real-world and synthetic datasets demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms previous approaches both quantitatively and qualitatively. We also refer the reviewers to the video demo contained in the supplementary material for video results. The code will be publicly available at https://github.com/CS-GangXu/UniE2F.
tldr: This paper introduces UniE2F, a unified diffusion framework leveraging video foundation models to reconstruct high-fidelity video frames from event data, outperforming previous methods in event-to-frame reconstruction, interpolation, and prediction.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了UniE2F，一个统一的扩散框架，利用视频基础模型从事件数据中重建高保真视频帧，在事件到帧的重构、插值和预测方面优于以往方法。
summary_zh: 事件相机在高速度、低功耗和高动态范围场景感知方面表现出色。然而，由于它们从根本上只记录相对强度变化，而非绝对强度，因此生成的数据流会遭受显著的空间信息和静态纹理细节损失。本文通过利用预训练视频扩散模型的生成先验，从稀疏事件数据中重建高质量视频帧来解决这一局限性。具体而言，我们首先建立一个基线模型，直接将事件数据作为条件来合成视频。然后，基于事件流与视频帧之间的物理相关性，我们进一步引入基于事件的帧间残差引导，以增强视频帧重建的准确性。此外，我们通过调节反向扩散采样过程，以零样本方式将我们的方法扩展到视频帧插值和预测，从而创建一个统一的事件到帧的重建框架。在真实世界和合成数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的方法在定量和定性方面均显著优于以往方法。我们还建议审稿人参考补充材料中包含的视频Demo，以观看视频结果。 代码将在 https://github.com/CS-GangXu/UniE2F 上公开。

title: Design, Locomotion, and Control of Amphibious Robots: Recent Advances
summary: Amphibious robots, operating seamlessly across land and water, are advancing applications in conservation, disaster response, and defense. Their performance depends on locomotion mechanisms, actuation technologies, and sensor-control integration. This review highlights recent progress in these areas, examining movement strategies, material-based actuators, and control systems for autonomy and adaptability. Challenges and opportunities are outlined to guide future research toward more efficient, resilient, and multifunctional amphibious robots.
tldr: This review paper summarizes recent advances in amphibious robot design, locomotion, and control, highlighting movement strategies, actuators, and control systems for autonomy and adaptability. It also outlines future research directions in the field.
tldr_zh: 该综述论文总结了水陆两栖机器人设计、运动和控制方面的最新进展，重点介绍了自主和适应性的运动策略、执行器和控制系统。 它还概述了该领域未来的研究方向。
