summary_zh: 两栖机器人可在陆地和水域间无缝运行，正在推动环境保护、灾害响应和国防等领域的应用。它们的性能取决于运动机制、驱动技术和传感器-控制集成。本文综述了这些领域的最新进展，探讨了运动策略、基于材料的驱动器以及用于自主性和适应性的控制系统。文章还概述了挑战和机遇，以指导未来研究朝着更高效、更具弹性和更多功能的两栖机器人方向发展。

title: Path planning for unmanned surface vehicle based on predictive artificial potential field. International Journal of Advanced Robotic Systems
summary: Path planning for high-speed unmanned surface vehicles requires more complex solutions to reduce sailing time and save energy. This article proposes a new predictive artificial potential field that incorporates time information and predictive potential to plan smoother paths. It explores the principles of the artificial potential field, considering vehicle dynamics and local minimum reachability. The study first analyzes the most advanced traditional artificial potential field and its drawbacks in global and local path planning. It then introduces three modifications to the predictive artificial potential field-angle limit, velocity adjustment, and predictive potential to enhance the feasibility and flatness of the generated path. A comparison between the traditional and predictive artificial potential fields demonstrates that the latter successfully restricts the maximum turning angle, shortens sailing time, and intelligently avoids obstacles. Simulation results further verify that the predictive artificial potential field addresses the concave local minimum problem and improves reachability in special scenarios, ultimately generating a more efficient path that reduces sailing time and conserves energy for unmanned surface vehicles.
tldr: This paper proposes a predictive artificial potential field method for unmanned surface vehicle path planning, incorporating time information and predictive potential to generate smoother, more efficient paths while avoiding obstacles and local minima.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于无人水面艇路径规划的预测人工势场方法，该方法结合了时间信息和预测势能，从而生成更平滑、更高效的路径，同时避开障碍物和局部极小值。
summary_zh: 高速无人艇的路径规划需要更复杂的解决方案以减少航行时间和节省能源。本文提出了一种新的预测人工势场，它结合了时间信息和预测势能，以规划更平滑的路径。文章探讨了人工势场的原理，并考虑了车辆动力学和局部最小值可达性。该研究首先分析了最先进的传统人工势场及其在全球和局部路径规划中的不足之处。然后，文章对预测人工势场引入了三个改进——角度限制、速度调整和预测势能——以增强生成路径的可行性和平滑性。传统人工势场与预测人工势场之间的比较表明，后者成功地限制了最大转向角，缩短了航行时间，并智能地避开了障碍物。仿真结果进一步证实，预测人工势场解决了凹陷型局部最小值问题，并提高了特殊场景中的可达性，最终为无人艇生成了一条更高效的路径，从而减少了航行时间并节约了能源。

title: Characterizing MARL for Energy Control: A Multi-KPI Benchmark on the CityLearn Environment
summary: The optimization of urban energy systems is crucial for the advancement of sustainable and resilient smart cities, which are becoming increasingly complex with multiple decision-making units. To address scalability and coordination concerns, Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) is a promising solution. This paper addresses the imperative need for comprehensive and reliable benchmarking of MARL algorithms on energy management tasks. CityLearn is used as a case study environment because it realistically simulates urban energy systems, incorporates multiple storage systems, and utilizes renewable energy sources. By doing so, our work sets a new standard for evaluation, conducting a comparative study across multiple key performance indicators (KPIs). This approach illuminates the key strengths and weaknesses of various algorithms, moving beyond traditional KPI averaging which often masks critical insights. Our experiments utilize widely accepted baselines such as Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) and Soft Actor Critic (SAC), and encompass diverse training schemes including Decentralized Training with Decentralized Execution (DTDE) and Centralized Training with Decentralized Execution (CTDE) approaches and different neural network architectures. Our work also proposes novel KPIs that tackle real world implementation challenges such as individual building contribution and battery storage lifetime. Our findings show that DTDE consistently outperforms CTDE in both average and worst-case performance. Additionally, temporal dependency learning improved control on memory dependent KPIs such as ramping and battery usage, contributing to more sustainable battery operation. Results also reveal robustness to agent or resource removal, highlighting both the resilience and decentralizability of the learned policies.
tldr: This paper benchmarks MARL algorithms for energy management in smart cities using the CityLearn environment, proposing novel KPIs and showing that decentralized training outperforms centralized training.
tldr_zh: 本文使用CityLearn环境，对智能城市能源管理中的MARL算法进行基准测试，提出了新的KPI，并表明去中心化训练优于中心化训练。
summary_zh: 城市能源系统的优化对于推进可持续和具有韧性的智慧城市至关重要，而智慧城市正变得日益复杂，涉及多个决策单元。为解决可扩展性和协调性问题，多智能体强化学习（MARL）是一种很有前景的解决方案。本文针对能源管理任务中MARL算法的全面且可靠的基准测试的迫切需求。以CityLearn作为案例研究环境，因为它能真实地模拟城市能源系统，包含多个储能系统，并利用可再生能源。以此为基础，我们的工作设立了新的评估标准，对多个关键绩效指标（KPI）进行了对比研究。这种方法揭示了各种算法的关键优势和劣势，超越了传统KPI平均化，后者往往掩盖了关键洞察。我们的实验采用了广泛接受的基线算法，如近端策略优化（PPO）和软演员-评论家（SAC），并涵盖了不同的训练方案，包括去中心化训练-去中心化执行（DTDE）和中心化训练-去中心化执行（CTDE）方法，以及不同的神经网络架构。我们的工作还提出了新的KPI，以应对实际应用中的挑战，例如单栋建筑贡献和电池储能寿命。我们的研究结果表明，在平均性能和最坏情况性能方面，DTDE始终优于CTDE。此外，时间依赖性学习改进了对内存依赖型KPI（如斜坡和电池使用）的控制，从而有助于实现更可持续的电池运行。结果还揭示了对智能体或资源移除的鲁棒性，突显了学习策略的弹性和去中心化特性。

title: (Perlin) Noise as AI coordinator
summary: Large scale control of nonplayer agents is central to modern games, while production systems still struggle to balance several competing goals: locally smooth, natural behavior, and globally coordinated variety across space and time. Prior approaches rely on handcrafted rules or purely stochastic triggers, which either converge to mechanical synchrony or devolve into uncorrelated noise that is hard to tune. Continuous noise signals such as Perlin noise are well suited to this gap because they provide spatially and temporally coherent randomness, and they are already widely used for terrain, biomes, and other procedural assets. We adapt these signals for the first time to large scale AI control and present a general framework that treats continuous noise fields as an AI coordinator. The framework combines three layers of control: behavior parameterization for movement at the agent level, action time scheduling for when behaviors start and stop, and spawn or event type and feature generation for what appears and where. We instantiate the framework reproducibly and evaluate Perlin noise as a representative coordinator across multiple maps, scales, and seeds against random, filtered, deterministic, neighborhood constrained, and physics inspired baselines. Experiments show that coordinated noise fields provide stable activation statistics without lockstep, strong spatial coverage and regional balance, better diversity with controllable polarization, and competitive runtime. We hope this work motivates a broader exploration of coordinated noise in game AI as a practical path to combine efficiency, controllability, and quality.
tldr: The paper introduces a framework using Perlin noise as an AI coordinator in games, demonstrating its effectiveness in generating diverse and coordinated agent behaviors.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个使用Perlin噪声作为游戏AI协调器的框架，展示了其在生成多样化和协调的代理行为方面的有效性。
summary_zh: 大型非玩家角色(NPC)的规模化控制是现代游戏的核心，但生产系统仍难以平衡几个相互竞争的目标：局部平滑、自然的行为，以及全局协调的、跨越空间和时间的多样性。以往的方法依赖于手工编写的规则或纯粹的随机触发器，这要么收敛于机械的同步，要么演化为难以调整的、不相关的噪声。像柏林噪声这样的连续噪声信号非常适合填补这一空白，因为它们提供了空间和时间上连贯的随机性，并且已经被广泛用于地形、生物群落和其他程序化资产。我们首次将这些信号应用于大规模人工智能控制，并提出了一个将连续噪声场视为AI协调器的通用框架。该框架结合了三个控制层：代理层面上用于运动的行为参数化，用于控制行为开始和停止的动作时间调度，以及用于确定出现什么以及在哪里的生成方式（包括生成事件类型和特征）。我们可重复地实例化该框架，并在多个地图、规模和种子下，将柏林噪声作为代表性的协调器，与随机、滤波、确定性、邻域约束和受物理启发的基础模型进行评估。实验表明，协调的噪声场提供了稳定的激活统计数据而没有锁步现象，强大的空间覆盖和区域平衡，更好的多样性以及可控的极化，以及具有竞争力的运行时。我们希望这项工作能够推动对游戏AI中协调噪声的更广泛探索，将其作为结合效率、可控性和质量的实用途径。

title: BriMA: Bridged Modality Adaptation for Multi-Modal Continual Action Quality Assessment
summary: Action Quality Assessment (AQA) aims to score how well an action is performed and is widely used in sports analysis, rehabilitation assessment, and human skill evaluation. Multi-modal AQA has recently achieved strong progress by leveraging complementary visual and kinematic cues, yet real-world deployments often suffer from non-stationary modality imbalance, where certain modalities become missing or intermittently available due to sensor failures or annotation gaps. Existing continual AQA methods overlook this issue and assume that all modalities remain complete and stable throughout training, which restricts their practicality. To address this challenge, we introduce Bridged Modality Adaptation (BriMA), an innovative approach to multi-modal continual AQA under modality-missing conditions. BriMA consists of a memory-guided bridging imputation module that reconstructs missing modalities using both task-agnostic and task-specific representations, and a modality-aware replay mechanism that prioritizes informative samples based on modality distortion and distribution drift. Experiments on three representative multi-modal AQA datasets (RG, Fis-V, and FS1000) show that BriMA consistently improves performance under different modality-missing conditions, achieving 6--8\% higher correlation and 12--15\% lower error on average. These results demonstrate a step toward robust multi-modal AQA systems under real-world deployment constraints.
tldr: The paper introduces BriMA, a novel approach for multi-modal continual Action Quality Assessment (AQA) that addresses modality-missing scenarios in real-world deployments by using a bridged imputation module and a modality-aware replay mechanism.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了BriMA，一种新颖的多模态持续动作质量评估（AQA）方法，通过使用桥接插补模块和模态感知重放机制，解决了现实部署中模态缺失的问题。
summary_zh: 动作质量评估 (AQA) 旨在对动作表现的优劣进行评分，并广泛应用于运动分析、康复评估和人类技能评价。最近，多模态 AQA 通过利用互补的视觉和运动学线索取得了显著进展，但实际部署往往受到非平稳模态失衡的影响，即由于传感器故障或标注缺失，某些模态会缺失或间歇性地不可用。现有的持续 AQA 方法忽略了这个问题，并且假设所有模态在整个训练过程中保持完整和稳定，这限制了它们的实用性。为了应对这一挑战，我们引入了桥接模态适应 (BriMA)，这是一种在模态缺失条件下进行多模态持续 AQA 的创新方法。BriMA 由一个记忆引导的桥接插补模块组成，该模块使用任务无关和任务特定的表示来重建缺失的模态，以及一个模态感知的重放机制，该机制根据模态扭曲和分布漂移来优先考虑信息量大的样本。在三个代表性的多模态 AQA 数据集（RG、Fis-V 和 FS1000）上的实验表明，BriMA 在不同的模态缺失条件下都能持续提高性能，平均达到 6-8% 的更高相关性和 12-15% 的更低误差。这些结果展示了在真实部署约束下构建鲁棒的多模态 AQA 系统的一步。

title: An Interpretable Data-Driven Model of the Flight Dynamics of Hawks
summary: Despite significant analysis of bird flight, generative physics models for flight dynamics do not currently exist. Yet the underlying mechanisms responsible for various flight manoeuvres are important for understanding how agile flight can be accomplished. Even in a simple flight, multiple objectives are at play, complicating analysis of the overall flight mechanism. Using the data-driven method of dynamic mode decomposition (DMD) on motion capture recordings of hawks, we show that multiple behavioral states such as flapping, turning, landing, and gliding, can be modeled by simple and interpretable modal structures (i.e. the underlying wing-tail shape) which can be linearly combined to reproduce the experimental flight observations. Moreover, the DMD model can be used to extrapolate naturalistic flapping. Flight is highly individual, with differences in style across the hawks, but we find they share a common set of dynamic modes. The DMD model is a direct fit to data, unlike traditional models constructed from physics principles which can rarely be tested on real data and whose assumptions are typically invalid in real flight. The DMD approach gives a highly accurate reconstruction of the flight dynamics with only three parameters needed to characterize flapping, and a fourth to integrate turning manoeuvres. The DMD analysis further shows that the underlying mechanism of flight, much like simplest walking models, displays a parametric coupling between dominant modes suggesting efficiency for locomotion.
tldr: This paper presents a data-driven approach using Dynamic Mode Decomposition (DMD) to model hawk flight dynamics, achieving interpretable and accurate reconstructions of flight maneuvers from motion capture data.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种数据驱动方法，使用动态模式分解（DMD）来模拟鹰的飞行动力学，从运动捕捉数据中实现了对飞行动作的可解释且准确的重建。
summary_zh: 尽管对鸟类飞行进行了大量的分析，但目前尚不存在飞行动力学的生成物理模型。然而，负责各种飞行机动的潜在机制对于理解如何实现敏捷飞行至关重要。即使在简单的飞行中，也存在多个目标，从而复杂化了对整体飞行机制的分析。通过对鹰的运动捕捉记录使用动态模式分解（DMD）这种数据驱动方法，我们表明，诸如拍打、转弯、着陆和平滑等多种行为状态，可以用简单且可解释的模态结构（即潜在的翼 - 尾形状）来建模，并且这些模态结构可以线性组合以重现实验飞行观测结果。此外，DMD模型可用于外推自然的拍打动作。飞行具有高度的个体性，不同鹰的飞行风格存在差异，但我们发现它们共享一组通用的动态模式。与传统的基于物理原理构建的模型不同，DMD模型直接拟合数据，而传统模型很少能用真实数据进行测试，并且其假设通常在真实飞行中无效。DMD方法能够以高精度重建飞行动力学，仅需三个参数来表征拍打，以及第四个参数来整合转弯机动。DMD分析进一步表明，飞行的潜在机制，与最简单的行走模型非常相似，表现出主导模式之间的参数耦合，暗示了运动的效率。

title: A User-driven Design Framework for Robotaxi
summary: Robotaxis are emerging as a promising form of urban mobility, yet research has largely emphasized technical driving performance while leaving open how passengers experience and evaluate rides without a human driver. To address the limitations of prior work that often relies on simulated or hypothetical settings, we investigate real-world robotaxi use through 18 semi-structured interviews and autoethnographic ride experiences. We found that users were drawn to robotaxis by low cost, social recommendation, and curiosity. They valued a distinctive set of benefits, such as an increased sense of agency, and consistent driving behavioral consistency and standardized ride experiences. However, they encountered persistent challenges around limited flexibility, insufficient transparency, management difficulty, robustness concerns in edge cases, and emergency handling concerns. Robotaxi experiences were shaped by privacy, safety, ethics, and trust. Users were often privacy-indifferent yet sensitive to opaque access and leakage risks; safety perceptions were polarized; and ethical considerations surfaced round issues such as accountability, feedback responsibility and absence of human-like social norms. Based on these findings, we propose a user-driven design framework spanning the end-to-end journey, such as pre-ride configuration (hailing), context-aware pickup facilitation (pick-up) in-ride explainability (traveling), and accountable post-ride feedback (drop-off) to guide robotaxi interaction and service design.
tldr: This paper investigates user experiences with real-world robotaxis and proposes a user-driven design framework to address issues like flexibility, transparency, and safety based on user feedback.
tldr_zh: 本文调查了用户在真实世界中使用无人驾驶出租车的体验，并提出了一个用户驱动的设计框架，以解决诸如灵活性、透明度和安全性等问题，该框架基于用户反馈。
summary_zh: 无人驾驶出租车正在成为一种有前景的城市出行方式，但研究主要侧重于技术驾驶性能，而忽略了乘客在没有人类驾驶员的情况下如何体验和评价乘车过程。为了解决先前研究通常依赖模拟或假设环境的局限性，我们通过18次半结构化访谈和自民族志乘车体验，调查了现实世界中无人驾驶出租车的使用情况。我们发现，用户被低成本、社交推荐和好奇心所吸引。他们珍视一套独特的优势，例如增强的自主感、一致的驾驶行为连贯性和标准化的乘车体验。然而，他们也遇到了持续的挑战，如有限的灵活性、透明度不足、管理困难、极端情况下的鲁棒性问题以及紧急情况处理问题。无人驾驶出租车的体验受到隐私、安全、伦理和信任的影响。用户通常对隐私漠不关心，但对不透明的访问和泄露风险很敏感；安全认知两极分化；伦理考量围绕诸如责任归属、反馈责任和缺乏类似人类的社交规范等问题浮出水面。基于这些发现，我们提出了一个用户驱动的设计框架，涵盖了端到端的旅程，例如乘车前的配置（叫车）、情境感知的接送便利（接送）、旅途中的可解释性（行进）和负责任的乘车后反馈（下车），以指导无人驾驶出租车的交互和服务设计。

title: A Checklist for Deploying Robots in Public: Articulating Tacit Knowledge in the HRI Community
summary: Many of the challenges encountered in in-the-wild public deployments of robots remain undocumented despite sharing many common pitfalls. This creates a high barrier of entry and results in repetition of avoidable mistakes. To articulate the tacit knowledge in the HRI community, this paper presents a guideline in the form of a checklist to support researchers in preparing for robot deployments in public. Drawing on their own experience with public robot deployments, the research team collected essential topics to consider in public HRI research. These topics are represented as modular flip cards in a hierarchical table, structured into deployment phases and important domains. We interviewed six interdisciplinary researchers with expertise in public HRI and show how including community input refines the checklist. We further show the checklist in action in context of real public studies. Finally, we contribute the checklist as an open-source, customizable community resource that both collects joint expertise for continual evolution and is usable as a list, set of cards, and an interactive web tool.
tldr: This paper introduces a checklist designed to help researchers avoid common pitfalls when deploying robots in public settings. It presents the checklist as an open-source, customizable tool that facilitates knowledge sharing and continual improvement within the HRI community.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个清单，旨在帮助研究人员避免在公共场所部署机器人时常犯的错误。 它将清单作为一个开源、可定制的工具，促进了人机交互（HRI）社区内的知识共享和持续改进。
summary_zh: 尽管在野外公共环境中机器人部署遇到的许多挑战存在共同的陷阱，但多数仍未被记录。这导致了较高的入门门槛，并造成了可避免错误的重复发生。为了阐明人机交互（HRI）领域的隐性知识，本文以检查清单的形式提供了一份指南，以支持研究人员为公共环境中的机器人部署做准备。研究团队根据自身在公共机器人部署方面的经验，收集了在公共HRI研究中需要考虑的关键主题。这些主题以模块化的翻转卡片形式呈现在一个分层表格中，并按照部署阶段和重要领域进行组织。我们采访了六位具有公共HRI专业知识的跨学科研究人员，展示了纳入社群意见如何完善检查清单。我们还展示了该检查清单在实际公共研究背景下的应用。最后，我们将该检查清单作为开源、可定制的社群资源贡献出来，它既收集了共同的专业知识以进行持续演变，又可以作为清单、卡片集和交互式网络工具使用。

title: A Two-Stage Detection-Tracking Framework for Stable Apple Quality Inspection in Dense Conveyor-Belt Environments
summary: Industrial fruit inspection systems must operate reliably under dense multi-object interactions and continuous motion, yet most existing works evaluate detection or classification at the image level without ensuring temporal stability in video streams. We present a two-stage detection-tracking framework for stable multi-apple quality inspection in conveyor-belt environments. An orchard-trained YOLOv8 model performs apple localization, followed by ByteTrack multi-object tracking to maintain persistent identities. A ResNet18 defect classifier, fine-tuned on a healthy-defective fruit dataset, is applied to cropped apple regions. Track-level aggregation is introduced to enforce temporal consistency and reduce prediction oscillation across frames. We define video-level industrial metrics such as track-level defect ratio and temporal consistency to evaluate system robustness under realistic processing conditions. Results demonstrate improved stability compared to frame-wise inference, suggesting that integrating tracking is essential for practical automated fruit grading systems.
tldr: The paper introduces a two-stage detection-tracking framework using YOLOv8 and ByteTrack for stable apple quality inspection on conveyor belts, improving temporal consistency and overall robustness compared to frame-wise inference.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个两阶段检测跟踪框架，使用YOLOv8和ByteTrack，在传送带上进行稳定的苹果质量检测，与逐帧推理相比，提高了时间一致性和整体鲁棒性。
summary_zh: 工业水果检测系统必须在密集的多个物体交互和连续运动下可靠运行，然而，现有的大部分工作都在图像级别评估检测或分类，而没有确保视频流的时间稳定性。我们提出了一种两阶段的检测-跟踪框架，用于传送带环境下稳定的多苹果质量检测。首先，一个在果园训练过的YOLOv8模型执行苹果定位，然后使用ByteTrack多目标跟踪来保持持久的身份。一个在健康-缺陷水果数据集上微调的ResNet18缺陷分类器被应用于裁剪的苹果区域。引入了轨迹级别的聚合来增强时间一致性，并减少跨帧的预测振荡。我们定义了视频级别的工业指标，如轨迹级别的缺陷率和时间一致性，以评估系统在实际处理条件下的鲁棒性。结果表明，与逐帧推断相比，稳定性得到了提高，这表明集成跟踪对于实用的自动化水果分级系统至关重要。

title: Depth-Enhanced YOLO-SAM2 Detection for Reliable Ballast Insufficiency Identification
summary:
This paper presents a depth-enhanced YOLO-SAM2 framework for detecting ballast insufficiency in railway tracks using RGB-D data. Although YOLOv8 provides reliable localization, the RGB-only model shows limited safety performance, achieving high precision (0.99) but low recall (0.49) due to insufficient ballast, as it tends to over-predict the sufficient class. To improve reliability, we incorporate depth-based geometric analysis enabled by a sleeper-aligned depth-correction pipeline that compensates for RealSense spatial distortion using polynomial modeling, RANSAC, and temporal smoothing. SAM2 segmentation further refines region-of-interest masks, enabling accurate extraction of sleeper and ballast profiles for geometric classification.
  Experiments on field-collected top-down RGB-D data show that depth-enhanced configurations substantially improve the detection of insufficient ballast. Depending on bounding-box sampling (AABB or RBB) and geometric criteria, recall increases from 0.49 to as high as 0.80, and F1-score improves from 0.66 to over 0.80. These results demonstrate that integrating depth correction with YOLO-SAM2 yields a more robust and reliable approach for automated railway ballast inspection, particularly in visually ambiguous or safety-critical scenarios.
tldr: The paper introduces a depth-enhanced YOLO-SAM2 framework for improved detection of ballast insufficiency in railway tracks using RGB-D data, achieving significant gains in recall and F1-score compared to RGB-only YOLOv8.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种深度增强的 YOLO-SAM2 框架，用于利用 RGB-D 数据改进铁路轨道中道砟不足的检测，与仅使用 RGB 的 YOLOv8 相比，在召回率和 F1 分数方面取得了显着提升。
summary_zh:
本文提出了一种深度增强的YOLO-SAM2框架，用于利用RGB-D数据检测铁轨道砟不足。尽管YOLOv8提供了可靠的定位，但仅依赖RGB的模型在安全性方面表现有限，精度较高（0.99）但召回率较低（0.49），这是由于道砟不足时，该模型倾向于过度预测充足类别。为了提高可靠性，我们结合了基于深度的几何分析，该分析通过枕木对齐的深度校正流程来实现，该流程利用多项式建模、RANSAC算法和时间平滑来补偿RealSense的空间畸变。SAM2分割进一步细化了感兴趣区域的掩码，从而能够准确提取枕木和道砟的轮廓用于几何分类。
  在现场采集的俯视RGB-D数据上的实验表明，深度增强的配置显著改善了道砟不足的检测效果。取决于边界框采样方法（AABB或RBB）和几何标准，召回率从0.49提高到高达0.80，F1分数从0.66提高到0.80以上。这些结果表明，将深度校正与YOLO-SAM2相结合，能够为自动化铁路道砟检测提供一种更鲁棒和可靠的方法，尤其是在视觉模糊或安全关键的场景中。

title: YOLOv10-Based Multi-Task Framework for Hand Localization and Laterality Classification in Surgical Videos
summary: Real-time hand tracking in trauma surgery is essential for supporting rapid and precise intraoperative decisions. We propose a YOLOv10-based framework that simultaneously localizes hands and classifies their laterality (left or right) in complex surgical scenes. The model is trained on the Trauma THOMPSON Challenge 2025 Task 2 dataset, consisting of first-person surgical videos with annotated hand bounding boxes. Extensive data augmentation and a multi-task detection design improve robustness against motion blur, lighting variations, and diverse hand appearances. Evaluation demonstrates accurate left-hand (67\%) and right-hand (71\%) classification, while distinguishing hands from the background remains challenging. The model achieves an $mAP_{[0.5:0.95]}$ of 0.33 and maintains real-time inference, highlighting its potential for intraoperative deployment. This work establishes a foundation for advanced hand-instrument interaction analysis in emergency surgical procedures.
tldr: This paper presents a YOLOv10-based multi-task framework for real-time hand localization and laterality classification in surgical videos, achieving real-time performance with an mAP of 0.33. While the hand localization accuracy could be improved, it lays a foundation for hand-instrument interaction analysis.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于YOLOv10的多任务框架，用于实时手术视频中手部定位和左右手分类，实现了实时性能，mAP为0.33。虽然手部定位精度有待提高，但为手-器交互分析奠定了基础。
summary_zh: 创伤手术中的实时手部跟踪对于支持快速而精确的术中决策至关重要。我们提出了一种基于YOLOv10的框架，可以在复杂的手术场景中同时定位手部并对其左右侧进行分类。该模型在 Trauma THOMPSON Challenge 2025 Task 2 数据集上进行训练，该数据集包含带标注手部边界框的第一人称手术视频。广泛的数据增强和多任务检测设计提高了模型对抗运动模糊、光照变化和各种手部外观的鲁棒性。评估结果表明，左手分类准确率为 67%，右手分类准确率为 71%，但区分手部和背景仍然具有挑战性。该模型实现了 0.33 的 $mAP_{[0.5:0.95]}$，并保持了实时推理速度，突显了其术中部署的潜力。这项工作为急诊手术中高级手-器械交互分析奠定了基础。

title: AdsorbFlow: energy-conditioned flow matching enables fast and realistic adsorbate placement
summary:
Identifying low-energy adsorption geometries on catalytic surfaces is a practical bottleneck for computational heterogeneous catalysis: the difficulty lies not only in the cost of density functional theory (DFT) but in proposing initial placements that relax into the correct energy basins. Conditional denoising diffusion has improved success rates, yet requires $\sim$100 iterative steps per sample.
  Here we introduce AdsorbFlow, a deterministic generative model that learns an energy-conditioned vector field on the rigid-body configuration space of adsorbate translation and rotation via conditional flow matching. Energy information enters through classifier-free guidance conditioning -- not energy-gradient guidance -- and sampling reduces to integrating an ODE in as few as 5 steps.
  On OC20-Dense with full DFT single-point verification, AdsorbFlow with an EquiformerV2 backbone achieves 61.4% SR@10 and 34.1% SR@1 -- surpassing AdsorbDiff (31.8% SR@1, 41.0% SR@10) at every evaluation level and AdsorbML (47.7% SR@10) -- while using 20 times fewer generative steps and achieving the lowest anomaly rate among generative methods (6.8%). On 50 out-of-distribution systems, AdsorbFlow retains 58.0% SR@10 with a MLFF-to-DFT gap of only 4~percentage points. These results establish that deterministic transport is both faster and more accurate than stochastic denoising for adsorbate placement.
tldr: AdsorbFlow, a novel energy-conditioned flow matching method, significantly improves the speed and accuracy of adsorbate placement for catalytic surface simulations compared to existing diffusion-based methods by learning a deterministic vector field. It demonstrates state-of-the-art performance on the OC20-Dense dataset.
tldr_zh: AdsorbFlow是一种新的能量条件流匹配方法，与现有的基于扩散的方法相比，它通过学习确定性向量场，显著提高了用于催化表面模拟的吸附物放置的速度和准确性。它在OC20-Dense数据集上展示了最先进的性能。
summary_zh:
识别催化表面上的低能吸附几何构型是计算非均相催化的一个实际瓶颈：困难不仅在于密度泛函理论（DFT）的计算成本，还在于提出能够弛豫到正确能量盆地的初始位置。条件去噪扩散提高了成功率，但每个样本需要约100次迭代步骤。

  在此，我们引入AdsorbFlow，一种确定性的生成模型，它通过条件流匹配学习吸附质平动和转动刚体构型空间上的能量条件向量场。能量信息通过无分类器引导条件化（而不是能量梯度引导）进入，而采样简化为在至多5步中积分一个常微分方程。

  在使用完整DFT单点验证的OC20-Dense数据集上，带有EquiformerV2骨干网络的AdsorbFlow实现了61.4%的SR@10和34.1%的SR@1 —— 在每个评估级别上都超过了AdsorbDiff（31.8%的SR@1，41.0%的SR@10）和AdsorbML（47.7%的SR@10）—— 同时使用少20倍的生成步骤，并实现了生成方法中最低的异常率（6.8%）。在50个超出分布的体系上，AdsorbFlow保留了58.0%的SR@10，且MLFF到DFT的差距仅为4个百分点。这些结果表明，对于吸附质放置，确定性传输比随机去噪更快且更准确。
